name: Chris Jacobs
subject: “Nasty, negative” attacks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Dear Friend, I entered this race almost a year ago because Western New York needed new leadership, and I knew that integrity, honor, and respect needed to be returned to this Congressional seat. Western New York is my home and a place I love deeply. I am running to fight for you in Washington and fight alongside Donald Trump. **That is why I am proud to be the ONLY candidate to have the endorsement of President Trump.** So much is at stake this election, yet Beth Parlato seems to be more consumed by her selfish ambitions than reclaiming a Republican House majority! As first reported today by the [Buffalo News](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/oH8PbufxYSJpQTa7yCzNXg/0pOoD9kb5eexXmeerzMsmg), all eight Republicans chairs in the 27th district have signed a letter to Parlato demanding she "suspend your negative campaign and promote your own candidacy rather than viciously attacking others."
You may have seen Beth's dishonest attacks against me on television and in the mail. They've been described as "nasty" and "negative," the sort of smears desperate candidates resort to when they've got nothing else. Beth gave her word last year not to run a negative campaign and not to work to split the vote to hand our congressional seat to a Democrat. Now she's broken that pledge. We shouldn't be surprised, she viciously attacked State Senator Rob Ortt in January. We must fight back and ensure that we have strong conservative leadership in Washington and I'm proud to have the President behind me, and on June 23rd I plan on going to Washington to help him fight for you and only you. [If you can help us defeat liberal Nate McMurray and fight back against Beth Parlato's nasty attack ads, please consider a donation to our campaign today. ](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/rfrw7ksRy8zBxImh6zA5uA/0pOoD9kb5eexXmeerzMsmg) Sincerely, Chris PS: [You can view our latest ad - a positive ad - touting President Trump's endorsement here.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/Dp1M8j3P0mj1IvNwhYgOpg/0pOoD9kb5eexXmeerzMsmg)
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/L8nsy8dNZNpycdfKampzlg/0pOoD9kb5eexXmeerzMsmg) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/fWFhac5dSrKCvVEXAh763YHw/0pOoD9kb5eexXmeerzMsmg)
* * *
5501 Camp Road
P.O. Box 893

subject: China is threatening to sanction me

body:
You sent me to the Senate to fight for our values and what's right -- and that means standing up to China. It's more important than ever for us to defend the Senate Majority so we can continue to fight for the American people.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click [here.](http://targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/SubscriptionCenter/BlackburnSubscriptionCenter?spMailingID=42503755&spUserID=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&spJobID=MTc2MTQwNzYzOAS2&spReportId=MTc2MTQwNzYzOAS2)
****
****
__
******
Mid-Month Deadline: 11:59 TOMORROW******

Peter,

While Democrats are back to playing political games and pointing fingers at the President, I've been fighting to hold China accountable. I've called China out on their human rights violations, their infringements on our privacy, their violent response to the Hong Kong freedom fighters, and their role in the coronavirus pandemic. **Now, the Communist Party of China is threatening to sanction me.**

Peter, it's all on the line in November, and with the recent reports about China, it's more important than ever for us to defend the Senate Majority so we can continue to fight for the American people.

**We 're $12,642 short of our mid-month fundraising goal and if we fall behind, we'll be at risk of losing it all.**

Can you help us catch up and ensure that we hit our goal by MIDNIGHT TOMORROW?

**[**RUSH DONATE -> **](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MDM3NTUS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQwNzYzOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
---

China lied, Peter, and it cost us lives. You sent me to the Senate to fight for our values and what's right -- and that means standing up to China. I'm proud to be leading this fight with my conservative colleagues, but if we don't close the fundraising gap and hit our goal, Republicans may not have the resources needed to keep the Majority and continue shining a light on China's lies, scheming, and deceit.

**Help me keep up the fight

[Chip in $10](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MDM3NTUS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQwNzYzOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

subject: what I learned on Trump's response to COVID-19 today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
we need your help to fight back |
---
[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390608/55b66746/203e1176/80ebf14/1602818705/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-Testimony?refcode=E2781-20200514-Testimony-graphic&amount=25") | _If you are an Actblue Express user, your donation to elect a Senator who will always hold the administration accountable will go through immediately:_

---
| **[$250](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-Testimony?refcode=E2781-20200514-Testimony-EG&express_lane=true&amount=250&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
---
| **[Other](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-Testimony?refcode=E2781-20200514-Testimony-EG&amount=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
---
* * *
This morning, for the first time in two months, I flew to D.C. to go to work.
Logan Airport was empty. I shared a plane with eight (masked) passengers. Shortly after I landed, I stepped into a House committee room on Capitol Hill for the first time months - gloves and mask on, wiping down the chair and desk around me.
I was there to question Rick Bright, a vaccine expert who was ousted by Trump's Department of Health and Human Services for doing his duty: blowing the whistle on the administration's failed response to COVID-19.
**His testimony and responses to my questions made one thing abundantly clear: This Administration knew how unprepared we were, and chose to do nothing.**
When I asked when there were first concerns about COVID-19, Mr. Bright responded: _" Early January."_
_Early January._ We could have acted sooner. But this administration chose not to. Now 80,000 Americans are dead.
We could have saved lives.
To make it even worse, Mr. Bright confirmed that the outgoing Obama Administration ran a pandemic simulation for Trump's team back in 2017, which uncovered systemic flaws in our country's readiness for a virus like COVID-19. Instead of taking it seriously, the Trump administration decimated CDC budgets and gutted the White House Pandemic Response Team on the National Security Council.
Mr. Bright answered my questions today to the best of his abilities. I appreciate him shedding light on the President's response. But it only reinforced what we already knew: The Trump Administration botched this crisis from the start.
And for me, it reinforced exactly why I decided to run for Senate - because we need stronger leadership in Washington. Not just to take on Donald Trump but to take on the decades of bad judgment and bad choices that left us so vulnerable to this virus in the first place.
The effort to recover and rebuild will be the fight of a generation. And I'll be in it with you, every step of the way.
**[We have a difficult Senate race ahead. If you agree we need stronger leadership in Washington, please chip in $3 or $25 to our fight. Every donation and every bit you are able to send is critical, with only 110 days left in this race.](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-Testimony?refcode=E2781-20200514-Testimony-SL&amount=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
If you can't pitch in today, that is okay. Know, your support, your advocacy and being part of this fight means the world. Know that I will continue to do everything I can to fight to hold the Trump administration accountable. We need resources. We need relief. We need recovery. And I will fight for you every step of the way. Be well. Be safe. Talk soon.
- Joe
|
---

If you'd still like to unsubscribe, you can do so by [clicking here.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390608/55b66746/203e1176/80ebf1c/1602818705/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Boston, MA 02137

#
I have some big news: Last week, the _Associated Press_ ranked my seat as one of the 10 most likely to flip. Trump only lost Minnesota by 1.5 points in 2016, which puts us at the top of his list — his campaign has already pledged to spend millions to win here. **It gets worse. My team ran the numbers last night and we are not on track to hit our mid-quarter fundraising goal. We’re actually pretty far behind.** Missing this goal would be devastating for our campaign, leaving us without the resources we need to take on whatever attacks come our way and stop Trump from flipping Minnesota red. **So, we’re announcing our most ambitious goal yet: Raising $50,000 in the next 24 hours. That’s what we need to stay on track with our numbers, and we need your help to do it. name: Dean Browning
subject: FWD: The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller: Chapter Three – President Trump
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
Welcome back for another chapter of The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller.
Today we will dive into Lisa Scheller's support of illegal immigration and sanctuary cities focusing on her vote to make Lehigh County a sanctuary county that would harbor dangerous illegal immigrants! Before we begin, I would like to make one thing clear: This Series is a direct response to Lisa Scheller's phony, slanderous website, where she paid Washington Establishment consultants thousands of dollars to smear my name.
I am doing this to DEFEND myself against Lisa Scheller's attacks. Bottom line: There is only ONE true, Trump conservative in this race - me!
I am passionate and fiercely devoted to the people of Lehigh Valley. I am fearful of what will happen to our district if Lisa Scheller is allowed to quietly push her Liberal Agenda on the national stage, like she has done here in the Lehigh Valley. This is why I need your help TODAY.
A donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 will help me to expose Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller for who she really is!
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XJIKaxIVDN-ALe3XuFoOvvUh4aGqryWFoP5jjfVlCgNN3lrJqCIs1rHAvGpktgloSY83Xbanb4VKzil3XDMCskJZG4raLAxaNXVIojV2qusieGz01JSQhxm-7q93g1FLM7QdkTS7OKOvv57ZxqYbcCMrrBWOfKqby4GUSMzXMwfbcg0sPxsuZg==&c=5WnBn9tweGjexbQc_EVAHzsDs7CayhzZKncJmUKRyFgVpFXBHdsu_g==&ch=jBIE83NU6spjETmses1shgoWBKs1cE-MZ7FPjr-vGwy-OfBQ-aNY3w==)
---
| Lisa Scheller tries to make herself appear as though she is against illegal immigration and sanctuary cities, but the facts - and her OWN VOTE - say differently.
Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller as County Commissioner VOTED TO MAKE LEHIGH COUNTY A SANCTUARY COUNTY.
Resolution No. 2014-36 made Lehigh County non-compliant and a sanctuary county.
This is confirmed by the fact that Lehigh County is on a list of sanctuary jurisdictions complied by Homeland Security in response to President Trump's Executive Order 13768.
Under this Resolution, local law enforcement is prevented from complying with any warrant issued by Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) asking that dangerous criminals, such as MS-13 gang members, be held for an additional 48 hours until ICE can take custody!
So how could Lisa Scheller be against sanctuary cities when she voted to ensure dangerous GANG MEMBER'S would be released back into OUR OWN community?
Do you believe she just magically changed her mind now that she is running for Congress? I don't buy it, as Lisa hasn't said anything about sanctuary cities during the previous five years since she voted to make Lehigh a Sanctuary County. Not - One - Word!
The Lehigh Valley needs a real, staunch conservative, not a Liberal, Lying, so-called "Republican" who votes more like The Squad (Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez of New York, Ilhan Omar of Minnesota, Ayanna Pressley of Massachusetts, and Rashida Tlaib of Michigan), than any conservative I know.
Here is my policy: I am AGAINST illegal immigration. I am AGAINST sanctuary cities. I SUPPORT legal immigration from all countries for families and individuals who go through the process and want to be in America to contribute to our society and pursue the American Dream. Lisa Scheller, similar to Rep. Susan Wild, is in full support of releasing dangerous illegal aliens and GANG MEMBERS back into the community with absolutely zero consequences.
This is factual evidence of Lying Lisa Scheller saying one thing and then doing the complete opposite!!! If you're like me and support our President, Donald J. Trump, in ending sanctuary cities and cracking down on dangerous illegal aliens and GANG MEMBERS, then I encourage you to contribute to my campaign today!
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XJIKaxIVDN-ALe3XuFoOvvUh4aGqryWFoP5jjfVlCgNN3lrJqCIs1rHAvGpktgloSY83Xbanb4VKzil3XDMCskJZG4raLAxaNXVIojV2qusieGz01JSQhxm-7q93g1FLM7QdkTS7OKOvv57ZxqYbcCMrrBWOfKqby4GUSMzXMwfbcg0sPxsuZg==&c=5WnBn9tweGjexbQc_EVAHzsDs7CayhzZKncJmUKRyFgVpFXBHdsu_g==&ch=jBIE83NU6spjETmses1shgoWBKs1cE-MZ7FPjr-vGwy-OfBQ-aNY3w==)
---
| Patriot, I hope you can see the difference between Lisa Scheller and myself.
While Lisa Scheller says one thing and does the other, pushing her Liberal agenda, I am fighting for conservative values FOR you and our President on the front lines (and we don't need expensive D.C. Consultants to get the job done)!!! Together we can beat Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller on June 2nd, 2020, and then take on Socialist incumbent Representative Susan Wild in November.
Don't miss next week's series of The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller.
Stay Safe, and as always, For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Conservative Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S. - did you know that Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller voted to make Lehigh County a sanctuary county?
How can she support our President and Country when she actively votes against the best interests of the American people?
Lisa Scheller needs to go! Will you support my campaign today with a donation of $50, $25, or even just $10?
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XJIKaxIVDN-ALe3XuFoOvvUh4aGqryWFoP5jjfVlCgNN3lrJqCIs1rHAvGpktgloSY83Xbanb4VKzil3XDMCskJZG4raLAxaNXVIojV2qusieGz01JSQhxm-7q93g1FLM7QdkTS7OKOvv57ZxqYbcCMrrBWOfKqby4GUSMzXMwfbcg0sPxsuZg==&c=5WnBn9tweGjexbQc_EVAHzsDs7CayhzZKncJmUKRyFgVpFXBHdsu_g==&ch=jBIE83NU6spjETmses1shgoWBKs1cE-MZ7FPjr-vGwy-OfBQ-aNY3w==)

name: Team NHGOP
subject: 2020 Census: Republicans need to be represented in a proper count
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDIxNjk1MzM4MzIxODExMzMxJmM9ZDBsMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDgyOTEyMTQmZD1mOGIyaTRz.HTi6a7ZKkyTKTZk3jZPaSx2k0nWNVI8W9jGB5M3h59E)
| | |
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| Derek, In addition to 2020 being an election year, it is also a Census year - **and it's important that Republicans take part and get counted.**
---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDIxNjk1MzM4MzIxODExMzMxJmM9ZDBsMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDgyOTEyMTYmZD1tNXEyeTVo.eqLoKGccEV5EUgRD5D1jSkTrztjjRv4OViuQxBtSK4E)
---
| |
---
| **The basics** ● The census counts every person living in the United States, regardless of age or citizenship status, every 10 years in years ending in 0. ● It’s in the Constitution. **It’s important** ● It’s about money, power, and data. ● Every 10 years we help decide how taxpayer dollars come back to our communities. The 2020 Census will help to distribute billions of dollars in federal resources to your community. ● Our community gets resources based on census population counts, that help pay for hospitals, emergency services, schools, roads, and more. ● An accurate and complete census helps businesses, community leaders and elected officials make informed decisions every day. **It’s easy** ● For the first time, people can respond online and by phone, in addition to the mail-in option. Your response impacts funding for your community for critical services for the next 10 years. ● The next decennial census happens in 2030. **It’s safe and confidential** ● Your data is protected and it’s confidential. Federal law protects your responses, which cannot be shared with law enforcement, immigration agencies, or housing authorities. **COVID-19 & the 2020 Census** ● The 2020 Census is underway and the most important and safe thing you can do is respond online, by phone, or by mail. It has never been easier to respond to the 2020 Census. ● Responding now will minimize the need for the Census Bureau to send census takers out into communities to follow up with households. ● Please check this page regularly for updates and adjustments in response to COVID-19.

---
---
| |
---
| | [Financial Benefit of the Census to New Hampshire](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDIxNjk1MzM4MzIxODExMzMxJmM9ZDBsMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDgyOTEyMjAmZD16NHU4aDNu.MhdVHLfyXdMkCCbG7jtL_Kv3ZUY70-yVMZH-Ez80tcg)
---
---
| |
---
| \- Team NHGOP
---
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Derek, In addition to 2020 being an election year, it is also a Census year - and it's important that Republicans take part and get counted. | | | | | | The basics ● The census counts every person living in the United States, regardless of age or citizenship status, every 10 years in years ending in 0. ● It’s in the Constitution. It’s important ● It’s about money, power, and data. ● Every 10 years we help decide how taxpayer dollars come back to our communities. The 2020 Census will help to distribute billions of dollars in federal resources to your community. ● Our community gets resources based on census population counts, that help pay for hospitals, emergency services, schools, roads, and more. ● An accurate and complete census helps businesses, community leaders and elected officials make informed decisions every day. It’s easy ● For the first time, people can respond online and by phone, in addition to the mail-in option. Your response impacts funding for your community for critical services for the next 10 years. ● The next decennial census happens in 2030. It’s safe and confidential ● Your data is protected and it’s confidential. Federal law protects your responses, which cannot be shared with law enforcement, immigration agencies, or housing authorities. COVID-19 & the 2020 Census ● The 2020 Census is underway and the most important and safe thing you can do is respond online, by phone, or by mail. It has never been easier to respond to the 2020 Census. ● Responding now will minimize the need for the Census Bureau to send census takers out into communities to follow up with households. ● Please check this page regularly for updates and adjustments in response to COVID-19. | | | | | | | \- Team NHGOP | | | | | | ---|---|--- New Hampshire GOP 10 Water Street, Concord New Hampshire 03301 United States You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us. | | | |

body:
We’ve entered the final phase of the Primary. I need your help now! |
---

| Dear Friend,

First, thank you – your support and help has allowed us to challenge the old establishment that is protecting Cory Booker.

**Booker's Democrat-inflated polls show him at just 50%._Pathetic_.** Because of you, we have a path to victory. For you, I will win this election.

## We have entered the last phase of this Primary and we need your help now.
---
| [STOP CORY BOOKER](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=8bfb2c8888&e=3e017fab0f "STOP CORY BOOKER")
---
| Since COVID-19 has ended the ability to conduct door-to-door campaigning or host fundraisers, we need immediate help to connect with people across the state. Three things we need ASAP:
1. **Funding** : If every single person who gets this email were to give $35 today, we could fully fund a _winning_ campaign till the end of the Primary.

I need your help right now, so if you can give more, now is the time. If you can give just $3, now is the time.

2. **Volunteers** : We have many activities across the state and we need people to help us. [Join here.](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=1b7b7b3011&e=3e017fab0f)

3. **Outreach** : You have more power than you realize. From a lawn sign that's seen by all your neighbors to a letter to the editor of your local news that's seen by the community to a bumper sticker which is seen by everyone — your opinion has a massive impact on what people decide on Election Day.

[Please check out our store](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=bfe9305532&e=3e017fab0f), where we will mail you lawn signs and bumper stickers to your door if you can contribute to the campaign. Some of our supporters [even make their own signs](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=a3657f44c8&e=3e017fab0f) and nothing is better than that!

---
| [STOP CORY BOOKER](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=a34a15a97b&e=3e017fab0f "STOP CORY BOOKER")
---
| I will fight as hard as possible for you, and I will not give in an inch. **_If you fight for me, we will win._**

Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**

_For the People_
Republican for U.S. Senate

body:

* China _**lied**_ about the COVID-19 outbreak for months

name: Joni Ernst
subject: We're falling behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa
body:
Tonight is our critical mid-month fundraising deadline, and we are falling behind pace to meet our goal and close the gap with the Democrats. Can you rush in a contribution of $5, $10, or ANY AMOUNT to help our team catch up immediately?
Friend,

**Tonight is our critical mid-month fundraising deadline, and we are falling behind pace to meet our goal and close the gap with the Democrats**. As Finance Director, it's my job to make sure we make the most of EVERY opportunity to raise as much money as possible for this campaign. And to be honest, the opportunities don't get much sweeter than getting $2 for every $1 we raise from our grassroots networks.
**Folks from every corner of the district -- and the country -- are lining up in Francis Conole 's corner because they know he's our ONLY chance to flip this district from red to blue.**
**[But we're counting on you to join us. We need another $2,101 TODAY in order to fully capitalize on our fundraising match opportunity. So please, chip in whatever you can to help us close this gap!](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b43a/388db0e9/8c8f510/609b90e3/2743525874/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9tYXkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiQ09OX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDUxNV9NaWRNb250aDRfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyNSJ9/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_may?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200515_MidMonth4_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=9+-+But+wersquore+counting+on+you+to+join+us&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200515_MidMonth4_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200515_MidMonth4_U1_X1")**

body:

[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pXLPxpU-dtjIjgZfvS2_oKQaFJx61MaPRzmW4RdTG0tRCoj7W7NeHUkj6VNQLVfYSPBgTyMQqUSmkOWuEpqDAEgrpyGJn5FfDn686gZf9DH7kTpcEVoW35-8cq7osemvdH2mlm35i6tGjCUtNBdREee1OYYHz3F8GwAaqPHu7tRSheeGoUimP5dh1EFe1XOXdkwX2XFig3HRKxWwNi-IEmgU3XwAdYNcWjUDppSs-6ZE8VjC_9NgjHv_Gz_vwM_VGG0IHcPymz1BL7WEfqs-c7qI0d756980THgjjbM42HY52ynf45amhGPOK0fD9CEFWP1ejgjrjlAAdLh2NsELIbIBkWaEM4ov&c=UtLIAUIsYS7KSyutLwihN_IlbTMNV7mleTaV3C-eRU4wu5DtxExJGQ==&ch=MGQCKfYMFeU2pnChO3m-aTrw0STDWZUVOCfI1kZUXqLDnljvzOHHJw==) Joe Biden is bowing to the farthest-left wing of his party, tasking Flip-flopper John Kerry and Mainstream Radical AOC with what could mean an implementation of the Green New Deal right here in Texas.

name: Tom Cotton
subject: My family is being threatened by China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
Yesterday, I received some shocking news. The Chinese Communist Party is threatening me and my family with sanctions. I have been calling out the Chinese Communists for unleashing the Wuhan Plague on the world from the start. Now, they are running scared and hitting back, coming after me personally.
Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42506375&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQ1MDIzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MDYzNzUS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQ1MDIzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,

Yesterday, I received some shocking news. **The Chinese Communist Party is threatening me and my family with sanctions.**

[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MDYzNzUS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQ1MDIzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
**[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MDYzNzUS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQ1MDIzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MDYzNzUS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQ1MDIzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

**" At least four US Congress members, including Tom Cotton, and two entities will be put on China's sanctions list."**
---
****I have been calling out the Chinese Communists for unleashing the Wuhan Plague on the world from the start.

Now, they are running scared and hitting back, coming after me personally.

My plan for China:
* Stop being politically correct--send China's spies right to jail
* Let the victims of this terrible virus sue China in court
* Build up our great military with President Trump****

China knows that that if **they can sanction me and cause me to lose my election this fall, they 'll be able to get away with anything.******

If China can sanction me and cause me to lose, then **no one will stand up to point out China 's role in causing this pandemic.**

I can't let this happen so I'm asking for your help. _This is personal._

[**Peter, will you send a message back to the murderous Chinese communist party and help my campaign with a contribution?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MDYzNzUS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQ1MDIzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

They want me to lose, but if I get the resources I need, then I'll be able to serve for six more years and fight the Chinese threat. | [DONATE](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MDYzNzUS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQ1MDIzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

In service,

Tom Cotton

| | | |
| Paid for by Cotton for Senate
---

2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

_Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch._

body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17507196/196597623/1521310305?refcode=em051520-header&refcode2=2ecc1ef7-d396-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWNjMWVmNy1kMzk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kQ89F-QiKNsyGyrPK4N7Pu91I4Wr657ew-JUhjHTEWg=) **** | | Friend,

**The Cook Political Report — a nationally-acclaimed group providing non-partisan election analysis — just upgraded our race against David Perdue _again_ in favor of Democrats.**

This race is now “Lean Republican,” one step away from being the Toss Up that folks in Georgia have been warning the national media about for over a year.

Cook writes that “Georgia is a state to watch at nearly every level in 2020” and that “both Democrats and Republicans privately believe this is a single-digit race.”

So while the belief is David Perdue will use his relationship with Trump to boost rural turnout and our nominee will focus on the suburbs, that won’t be enough to get the job done in Georgia.

We can’t write off rural voters, particularly rural African American voters, who have dealt with polling places being closed, rural hospitals being closed due to the failure to expand Medicaid, a spike in maternal mortality, and devastation from Hurricane Michael, trade wars, and the coronavirus pandemic.

[**We need a 159-county campaign to win the US Senate and the down ballot races across our state in a wave election that we HAVE to win — and I am the ONLY candidate in this race who can get the job done. clean_body: | | | | = ** | | Friend, The Cook Political Report — a nationally-acclaimed group providing non-partisan election analysis — just upgraded our race against David Perdue again in favor of Democrats. This race is now “Lean Republican,” one step away from being the Toss Up that folks in Georgia have been warning the national media about for over a year. Cook writes that “Georgia is a state to watch at nearly every level in 2020” and that “both Democrats and Republicans privately believe this is a single-digit race.” So while the belief is David Perdue will use his relationship with Trump to boost rural turnout and our nominee will focus on the suburbs, that won’t be enough to get the job done in Georgia. We can’t write off rural voters, particularly rural African American voters, who have dealt with polling places being closed, rural hospitals being closed due to the failure to expand Medicaid, a spike in maternal mortality, and devastation from Hurricane Michael, trade wars, and the coronavirus pandemic. = | | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = We have what it takes to win this election. I don’t accept corporate PAC money. You are the engine that will drive us forward to beat David Perdue and take back the Senate majority, and we’ll defeat Trump in the process. Thank you for being with me. Yours truly, Teresa PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906 =

The groundwork we lay TODAY will be crucial to winning in November. == The goal for May is even higher than last month's - And for a good reason! We can't combat the Left's constant attacks without the proper resources. States that have been red for YEARS are now up for grabs thanks to Liberal billionaires like Mike Bloomberg and George Soros. The President and his Senate allies need grassroots conservatives like YOU to rally behind them before the month ends. Will you answer the call to protect our conservative values? == == == == == Americans deserve better than the big-government policies of today's radical Democrat Party, especially after all we have been able to accomplish with our agenda that puts America First. Election Day is right around the corner, but our mid-month goal is already here. == Thank you for joining the fight, Sarah Huckabee Sanders == If you agree that President Trump and Republicans are MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN, text MAGA to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. T&C/Privacy Policy: == | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. == Contributions to the NRSC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. We're a threat to Nancy Pelosi's majority, Friend. We won our primary -- even defeating her handpicked candidate -- and have an incredible grassroots army behind us. That's why she's organizing to spend millions attacking us, in a desperate attempt to buy this seat right out from under us.

Our first critical campaign deadline of the month is tonight at midnight. Now more than ever, your support is critical to getting us to the finish line. We need your help to stand up to Nancy Pelosi's million dollar antics. [**Can we count on you to chip in by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019OGk0KbJ6YHZWBc5REG_nTlyLMjU3fEOtvGPQwWBGZs7xxUHwyIjP6dzXn2EqhCmnjb9mvCdtc0jxlTZXZVlE4EXnwDafIBoleElXd8Tz41ZhHTX5M9e47VApx7c2Qzzk7_wAceku8u9xmIezJnFjdw1M1FjPdYFG6POppUNrA3eedI44YabEwCuocTpCBYkULeI11j-sSkOIIAVdLA7AwA4inRsLgidW7CXGoY6Cd-WmkLZzS58LsyRnvywpYxITm-_vmRr7dg8MdWCZNxk94K5V8bBPvfCa7Cnr4l5Rxtpv2RaPeoQs2iOJZXhQGU36uh-Mz_883gHDWBgx_WKqZV2XzzCXaHxz5m4wdVkHeBrsw2x9eApuH8xalMffljNcZ-B6KTKdtRr3LjGHuqEuA==&c=ZeYCFmr6HIocQzm_0tepLBJHYqKS6LMzCRkkbEZ-0WqYYqnVkMaVAQ==&ch=XPMJVKfCmfpPldoHvU6ZQzKWKIqAeqMWeVPuGCqv3GKUIGppGxjSQw==)

As a proud immigrant and woman, I'm no stranger to the Left's attacks. In 2018, Pelosi and the liberal Democrats spent ten million dollars against me to keep our voice out of office. Now, they're more than willing to do it again.

_Why?_ Whoever wins this seat will determine who controls the House Majority. This seat was only recently flipped blue in 2018 and POLITICO is calling this race a toss-up. As one of the top-targeted races in the country, it's going to be a tough fight -- but we can't back down now.

I'm running for Congress to fight for lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment. I'm running to give conservative Californians a voice in Congress and restore common-sense leadership to Congress. It's time to put an end to the Left's socialist agenda and give California a better, brighter future -- but I can't do it alone.

[**If you are able, please chip in ahead of tonight 's mid-month fundraising deadline.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019OGk0KbJ6YHZWBc5REG_nTlyLMjU3fEOtvGPQwWBGZs7xxUHwyIjP6dzXn2EqhCmnjb9mvCdtc0jxlTZXZVlE4EXnwDafIBoleElXd8Tz41ZhHTX5M9e47VApx7c2Qzzk7_wAceku8u9xmIezJnFjdw1M1FjPdYFG6POppUNrA3eedI44YabEwCuocTpCBYkULeI11j-sSkOIIAVdLA7AwA4inRsLgidW7CXGoY6Cd-WmkLZzS58LsyRnvywpYxITm-_vmRr7dg8MdWCZNxk94K5V8bBPvfCa7Cnr4l5Rxtpv2RaPeoQs2iOJZXhQGU36uh-Mz_883gHDWBgx_WKqZV2XzzCXaHxz5m4wdVkHeBrsw2x9eApuH8xalMffljNcZ-B6KTKdtRr3LjGHuqEuA==&c=ZeYCFmr6HIocQzm_0tepLBJHYqKS6LMzCRkkbEZ-0WqYYqnVkMaVAQ==&ch=XPMJVKfCmfpPldoHvU6ZQzKWKIqAeqMWeVPuGCqv3GKUIGppGxjSQw==) These deadlines are important because they ensure we have the resources we need to take on Nancy Pelosi's millions and win. name: Roseanne Barr
subject: Jew-hating Do-Nothing Democrats
body:
If you’re like me, you’re probably sitting home on government mandated quarantine wondering what the hell happened to your country. Every time you turn on the news you get the darndest feeling that you are no longer in the land of the free, but a hostage in a timeshare-style pitch meeting for communism.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375899-884732-4999351-6498862e33-0772beed57)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375899-884732-4999350-f6b694157a-0772beed57) It’s Roseanne Barr. Yes, **that** Roseanne Barr.

If you’re like me, you’re probably sitting home on government mandated quarantine wondering what the hell happened to your country. Every time you turn on the news you get the darndest feeling that you are no longer in the land of the free, but a hostage in a timeshare-style pitch meeting for communism.

You’re tired of seeing millennial bartenders fake crying in ICE parking lots, virtue signaling their radical base of credit card hippies who think Greta Thunberg is an expert on infectious diseases while you’re told that you are a deplorable human being for wanting people to be able to work and feed their families.

You’re tired of thinking that you’re the only sane person in a world gone crazy . . . trust me, I get it, **BUT you’re not alone**.

You’re tired, and so am I.

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375899-884732-4999350-f6b694157a-0772beed57)
You’re wondering, how do we get off this crazy train?

It’s simple; we send the socialist, Jew-Hating, Do-Nothing Democrats in charge back home to their districts that are covered in the feces of drug addicted homeless people they care more about than hard working tax paying Americans and replace them with freedom loving patriots in Congress.

And that’s why I am writing to you right now . . . I have a close personal friend who is running for Congress in Florida’s 21st District and [**she needs your support!**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375899-884732-4999350-f6b694157a-0772beed57)

This election is no longer simply Republican vs. Democrat... its Freedom vs. Tyranny! And this woman is the way back!

[**That woman is my good friend Laura Loomer!**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375899-884732-4999350-f6b694157a-0772beed57)

We need strong patriotic women in Washington representing you and me, **and Laura is that woman**.

I’m backing Laura Loomer – [and you’re going to back Laura Loomer](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375899-884732-4999350-f6b694157a-0772beed57) – **because Ilhan, AOC, and the rest of the Democrats are TERRIFIED of her!**

**[Donate now. Give her all the money you can](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375899-884732-4999350-f6b694157a-0772beed57) and then knock on your neighbor Bob’s door and tell him to give you the $10 he owes you for beer money last November [and give that to Laura too!](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375899-884732-4999350-f6b694157a-0772beed57)**

If you want to send a young woman to Congress that will MAKE YOU PROUD, [then YOU have to back her with all you got!](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375899-884732-4999350-f6b694157a-0772beed57)

[Pony up and give Laura Loomer all your money!](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375899-884732-4999350-f6b694157a-0772beed57)

Thank you!

Roseanne Barr
Actress
Domestic Goddess
Crazy Lady

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375899-884732-4999350-f6b694157a-0772beed57)

Peter, Sen. Cornyn is _terrified_ that we're going to flip Texas. You only need to take a look at the emails his team sends out to know that he knows his seat is in play.

We've told you before that Sen. Cornyn and his corporate donors pay attention to the polls that show us closing in on his seat, but this makes it pretty clear. They know that MJ is going to give him the race of his life, and that's why **groups like the Koch network just committed SEVEN FIGURES to prop up his campaign.

Texas is flippable, and it's not a question of if it'll flip but when.** If we keep working hard and supporting MJ, we can make Sen. Cornyn's fears come true and make sure it's this year. MJ is the toughest opponent he's ever seen, and with you and the rest of her grassroots team, we're going to make sure that this is Sen. Cornyn's last term.

name: Team Jacobs
subject: ALL 8 GOP Chairs Call for Beth Parlato to “suspend” her “nasty, negative” attack ads
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
**ALL 8 GOP Chairs Call for Beth Parlato to "suspend" her "nasty, negative" attack ads ** _Chairs "deeply offended" by Parlato's "broken promise" _ As first reported by the [Buffalo News](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/8oSNDKjxR92E5Y8GCKf8921A/wjljwxNzDVQ7uo6ZM763OEIg), the Republican chairs in the 27th district have demanded that Beth Parlato "suspend (her) negative campaign and promote your own candidacy rather than viciously attacking others." ([Buffalo News, 5/13/20](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/8oSNDKjxR92E5Y8GCKf8921A/wjljwxNzDVQ7uo6ZM763OEIg)) "GOP leaders say they imposed one requirement on candidates interviewing for the 27th Congressional District seat back in January: refrain from attacks on fellow Republicans. Now those same chairmen from the district's eight counties accuse Beth A. Parlato, the family law attorney competing in the June 23rd Republican primary, of breaking her promise with "nasty, negative" mailings and television ads aimed at Christopher L. Jacobs..." ([Buffalo News, 5/13/20](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/8oSNDKjxR92E5Y8GCKf8921A/wjljwxNzDVQ7uo6ZM763OEIg)) "...party leaders say Parlato's jabs at Jacobs could threaten his efforts to win a special election against Democrat Nate McMurray.." ([Buffalo News, 5/13/20](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/8oSNDKjxR92E5Y8GCKf8921A/wjljwxNzDVQ7uo6ZM763OEIg)) '"We respectfully ask that you keep your commitment to run a positive campaign that avoids dividing the vote and potentially costing the Republican Party a member of Congress in the special election," the leaders told Parlato. "Please suspend your negative campaign and promote your own candidacy rather than viciously attacking others." The letter is signed by all eight leaders of the district's Republican committees..' ([Buffalo News, 5/13/20](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/8oSNDKjxR92E5Y8GCKf8921A/wjljwxNzDVQ7uo6ZM763OEIg)) "Republican chairs in the district said by running those ads, Parlato is squelching on a promise she made during the special election candidate nomination process." ([Spectrum News, 5/14/20](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/2G9s892RrnB6763pt94bplKk6g/wjljwxNzDVQ7uo6ZM763OEIg)) "Ontario County Republican Chairwoman Trisha Turner, speaking for the leaders' group, said Wednesday she is "deeply offended" by the Parlato efforts and insists they represent a broken promise." ([Buffalo News, 5/13/20](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/8oSNDKjxR92E5Y8GCKf8921A/wjljwxNzDVQ7uo6ZM763OEIg)) ""No one's ever told her to get out, not to run, just not to do something that would be destructive to a special election and she committed to that and she's broken that commitment," Turner says." ([Spectrum News, 5/14/20](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/2G9s892RrnB6763pt94bplKk6g/wjljwxNzDVQ7uo6ZM763OEIg)) ..."You pay people a lot of money to create that kind of negative imagery," Turner said, adding that attacks against a fellow Republican competing against McMurray at the same time as the primary are inappropriate. Turner also noted Parlato's earlier criticism of Robert G. Ortt, the North Tonawanda state senator who dropped out of the race after losing the party nod to Jacobs and whom Turner originally supported." ([Buffalo News, 5/13/20](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/8oSNDKjxR92E5Y8GCKf8921A/wjljwxNzDVQ7uo6ZM763OEIg)) One county chair described Parlato's negative campaign as "the continuation of a destructive behavior pattern for her own self-promotion," and said it seems "like she's working with Nate McMurray." ([Buffalo News, 5/13/20](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/8oSNDKjxR92E5Y8GCKf8921A/wjljwxNzDVQ7uo6ZM763OEIg))
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/892cwmRVRCBR9MJwdpBbhIKA/wjljwxNzDVQ7uo6ZM763OEIg) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/H4Qp3NcpjMMbSv892syOYgMg/wjljwxNzDVQ7uo6ZM763OEIg)
* * *
5501 Camp Road
P.O. Box 893
Hamburg, NY 14075-9998 PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/unsubscribe/Fc6SuitAsKVu8aWro763aKJJCNQw2PIOEJddCxdm6OxFg/5zyvI2LQ6kHGzjKRiv8neA/wjljwxNzDVQ7uo6ZM763OEIg)

name: Allen Chen
subject: elections are changing, and so are we

As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. Hi Team,

Sri emailed you yesterday about our new plan to Get Out the Vote this fall, as it looks increasingly likely that we will be continuing social distancing into the weeks leading up to November.

We know voting in this year’s election will look different than it has in the past, so we need to make sure that we’re prepared to help voters cast their ballots, no matter the circumstances.

**The data is clear, team: If we achieve a record turn-out in TX-22 in 2020, this district WILL flip blue.**

[**Can you make a donation to our GOTV fund to help Sri and our team ensure that not even one voter sits this election out because they are afraid or don’t have the information to vote? >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17508422/196616289/2147176479?refcode=em_fr_2020.05.15_AC_b1_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTA3MDczNy1kYjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZAGAROWQg7-HAAFGN7u9DZfU94nz672ls85HzgMcs2A=)

TX-22 has been named one of the top pick-up opportunities for Democrats in 2020. Last month we were named to the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee's prestigious Red to Blue list, and this month _Cook Political Report_ singled our district out, proclaiming that Democrats “have a good chance” of winning this seat!

Sri’s message is catching fire, team. Houston families are tired of political grandstanding and do-nothing representation. While our opponents compete in a race to the far right, Sri is focused on helping the community now and bringing common sense solutions that work for Texans to DC.

**We will win this election if we’re able to provide voters with the information they need to safely cast their ballots.**

[**Donate now to help us get out the vote and ensure commonsense leadership prevails in 2020!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17508423/196616290/2147176479?refcode=em_fr_2020.05.15_AC_b1_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTA3MDczNy1kYjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZAGAROWQg7-HAAFGN7u9DZfU94nz672ls85HzgMcs2A=)

-Allen Chen
Campaign Manager

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17508425/196616292/1700156400?refcode=em_fr_2020.05.15_AC_b1_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTA3MDczNy1kYjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZAGAROWQg7-HAAFGN7u9DZfU94nz672ls85HzgMcs2A=)

Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17508426/196616293/1700156400?refcode=em_fr_2020.05.15_AC_b1_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTA3MDczNy1kYjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZAGAROWQg7-HAAFGN7u9DZfU94nz672ls85HzgMcs2A=)

We want to make sure you saw Charlie’s email from yesterday.
Like he said, the campaign is really ramping up and spending a lot more money to reach voters these final six weeks. Unfortunately, we are short of what we need to raise to meet our mid-May budget. Right now, we’re still $6,120 away. **_[Can you make a donation to help us meet our budget?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IAE/ni0YAA/t.31s/yi0jFAJPTvyWv-4NNUV2yA/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKVYo5ChTqtfPDsuvWIeDghhrLsnP54So0GrRa0bdz7cRyGjsDB6WHOkH-2BA31UMuZm73meRmB2-2FqXZTjuuUvjMoX0veHRTba27nFJr3Ut56AxFkYTwNy-2Fg-2BFWseI5csDvt8p4dvkXulnGjV9m5ioUmcC5ynhHJX2XgsmZCT-2FrzVrg4cpvCMoA0NSvx6U1kQO-2BhNQz-2FfbxkdO-2FmNhiY-2Fqm-2FrpIBtalc5hCP-2B5DqOTYPxAeBtfEd-2BL0a3SddghyXki07wL5yUHRD6xn46kt-2Bi9hnK/G70u)_**
These final few weeks are so crucial to the campaign. Now is when a lot of voters start tuning in for the first time, and we need to make sure they’re hearing from Mondaire. **_[Please chip in today!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IAE/ni0YAA/t.31s/yi0jFAJPTvyWv-4NNUV2yA/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKVYo5ChTqtfPDsuvWIeDghhrLsnP54So0GrRa0bdz7cdSr1pPvVcKggiBbL7I2Vt3454cIlb5cUJaIFOYmZEZmZsT-2FuJlURRPp8LAj-2FFqHiYb-2F8uK0kgSQSqNjPpukYfNIEUzw-2F9eyefS9URr7G39TjXaorVqLqnLOD-2FO8WF2S-2F0GEQfEK1ml7OXMjv6baCmvYFL8wQEvS1XBpC4J-2B1aivtK79aiRY00NlbnxjWtv3AE37zTHa0TCKihUm7mXsKEQoX2aqaWFSpwTe85Es-2Br2k/tB98)_******
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IAE/ni0YAA/t.31s/yi0jFAJPTvyWv-4NNUV2yA/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKVYo5ChTqtfPDsuvWIeDghhrLsnP54So0GrRa0bdz7cfPsfMQh4AP-2F7UpEkqF7OfknMV6wyrsAy-2BAg33IWFBAuJo4AvaHefFSKQZediOSaowt9B2hOoiMToL0wNePptbOYHyxrUlBXAaCI5wQkDJ6HuNlBYzNDsEdj-2F39r-2FQ1jBHn1jq-2Ba4jpo7qpLBf5MRYVOBWYhaJFtVvHe6Fa8or-2Fihautpbsxhk17xjbwxVkiJI41GsCKLdztTH-2F9-2BY07mTqO-2FRVu5ZX61T-2BKqUVIJ1q-2F/Ihpw)
Team Mondaire
\-----------------------------------------
Friend, **** **** **** We’ve asked for your support a lot throughout this campaign. We’ve asked you to volunteer, make calls, host events, and talk to your friends. And we’ve also asked you to donate. _Often_.
We’ve spent donations on staff, campaign materials, an office (before COVID), a phone dialer, texts, and more. Now, with less than six weeks to go, it’s time to really ramp up the campaign.
What does that mean?
Soon, voters throughout the district will start hearing from our campaign a lot more. That means mailers to voters, digital ads on Facebook and elsewhere online, and TV ads from Mondaire. Plus we will still be calling and texting voters every single day. (Shout out to our college fellows who made almost 10,000 calls in a single phone bank this week! That's more than other candidates are able to do in an entire week.)
These are some of the biggest expenses of the campaign. We need to pick up our fundraising in the next few weeks to make sure we get our message out and don’t get drowned out by self-funders and candidates who are taking money from corporations.
In order to hit our budget, our goal is to raise an additional $200,000. To get there, we need to reach our mid-month goal for May, _but right now, we’re $9,820 away_. **_[Will you make a donation now so we can meet our goal and stay on track?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IAE/ni0YAA/t.31s/yi0jFAJPTvyWv-4NNUV2yA/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKVYo5ChTqtfPDsuvWIeDgh2zEf6e2WlXYc3NNPSSpEePKgi42TyHOeYqKi3KXmlQ46AUBArKBq6Tr6yaWJv67wg5FyZIGl3mQmXebuzcsuErHkfDtaJ1xqSv-2FGI3slFmCKnsBSWLhfNyvb-2FZSbaWIrJXZq92-2BoX0O1M04U1GkTqzkupUSCtkA-2FMIQar9NyjlBjv7-2FkqJWljIslIEtfTw2HypxvxRgugtBUamTd6Ops8gQxduRj2gQdr8-2B092PS7DFaNDPNdqpimuRTtDQQYmOl/YOl4) _**
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IAE/ni0YAA/t.31s/yi0jFAJPTvyWv-4NNUV2yA/h5/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKVYo5ChTqtfPDsuvWIeDgh2zEf6e2WlXYc3NNPSSpEeDQVLf7ir4sBaptJTO02OIs6w8zMtBdbi9Oo9PLGg9M4iexeG93mHZT2BiXMZGVwVNMcNknvYFZEbv9-2FEKfMWSoIah0P1BuMcDy3CgxcDpQ9cu2AJqM29nUKUVNIY3O3SclGj3dmQS4qoNcaVF9VB2H2SThLi8rcfjfUtApbKjGvyaWu3-2BQ1r-2Fop4te6wWtcDdsrBnjVvxH2rfuKtLEdB0QGDRrTiOGND-2B41-2FO-2B-2FQLGf/EmrM)
Everything in the campaign comes down to these last few weeks. We wish fundraising weren’t so important, but the fact is, you can’t win a race like this without spending well over a million dollars. We’re so close to hitting our fundraising goals, but we’re not there yet. **_[Can you donate today to help us get there?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IAE/ni0YAA/t.31s/yi0jFAJPTvyWv-4NNUV2yA/h6/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKVYo5ChTqtfPDsuvWIeDgh2zEf6e2WlXYc3NNPSSpEePV4bBah1vl5Rl6YOoL-2FXheWwFvakGbylvdwzrB8lrCvvbDegIALeHWUe2Kj-2B3uhoqoIGC8w7ExGZXKNiK7R09cL-2BC-2F5LtYti-2BGyQ77VJ4duvDfQamzTQMxlo4dqse6kO6ve-2FW81lMltLTwIYhTGweavHBPF4iZUF-2FnAhgAoSU4OpWWZ1HBtWENCZpHPfJ6J8cjOVKGK5QzXkraFsWlHqq08JZQwhVDxVaMCAhY47XXh/EltM)_**

There is only one candidate in this race who is fighting for real change that will make a difference in the lives of everyday people. You and I both know that. Now, we just need to make sure every Democratic voter in NY-17 knows that. **_[Help us get that message out there](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IAE/ni0YAA/t.31s/yi0jFAJPTvyWv-4NNUV2yA/h7/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKVYo5ChTqtfPDsuvWIeDgh2zEf6e2WlXYc3NNPSSpEeBsFqmz4t3QtakyUVXmRDllkC5iMHhvdJGW9V-2FmVDpik8ejX137zJFfyVJOqwpwXaVfdfccRKZVw6wKjixg1h7vkMysLoN5uDRHBQDwXgYpXBH6OD6NGM-2FeUMHfsdqwDAHr9T0ig1F-2Fvk66PjoTQ7YgZYdOWlzlOYmrhIiHNweqheFxziqZS2zGSbMwO-2BL-2BjXJV8mWB3SRqRLS6SFQkgm6EvdkQETz0u0Aynpu1bPuVG/4wt3)_**.
Let’s win this, Charlie Blaettler, Campaign Manager

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: What’s next in the COVID-19 fight?
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501144063%2501100453%2b-%2b05-15-2020%2beNewsletter%250115266.17104536.4601800.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501144063%2501100453%2b-%2b05-15-2020%2beNewsletter%250115266.17104536.4601800.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **May 15, 2020** |
---|---|---|---
| | | Throughout this pandemic, I have been inspired by all the ways Marylanders have stepped up to safely help neighbors and even complete strangers in need. Last week, I put on my Orioles face mask (yes, I've ordered my Nats face mask too!) and did some socially-distanced visits to those on the front lines.

At Lifebridge Health in Baltimore, I toured their makeshift sewing factory where employees and volunteers are stitching together personal protective equipment (PPE) with material provided by Under Armour - just one way Maryland organizations are helping address this crisis. And I joined volunteers to assemble weekend food packages at the Baltimore Hunger Project. They have expanded capacity to help Maryland children in need of food assistance, distributing over 42,000 pounds of food in just over six weeks.

I've connected virtually with Marylanders tackling this crisis from all different perspectives - small business owners, faith leaders, experts developing vaccines, non-profits, and military leaders, to name a few. But I have to say hosting a Virtual Kids Town Hall with some of Maryland's after-school programs offered a new point of view - how the coronavirus looks from a child's eyes. Usually at this time of year, I see students on their field trips to Washington, D.C., so it was fun to take their questions along with our special guest, public health expert Dr. Leana Wen. We discussed why social distancing is important to keep us all safe, what school might look like when it reopens, and some of the strangest things we've heard about COVID-19. Their questions reminded me how much our children soak up information in new situations, such as trading classroom life for distance learning.

As we all adapt, Marylanders are continuing to do their part to fight the virus. But government at every level needs to better meet the urgency of this moment. That means getting help to those who are still not receiving it - unemployed people who are struggling to get the Maryland Department of Labor to approve and pay out their benefits; small business owners who can't get loans or can't use them because of bureaucratic red tape imposed by the Treasury Department or Small Business Administration; people who need to get tested but can't; health care providers and other essential workers who are bravely staying on the job at their own risk without proper safety equipment and PPE; and the students, families, and teachers trying to learn and work from home without broadband or the necessary technology.

I share the frustrations of all these Marylanders, and I am fighting to address these problems and challenges. The fifth COVID relief package - called the Health and Economic Recovery Omnibus Emergency Solutions (HEROES) Act - is moving through the House of Representatives this week, and it includes many important provisions I have been working on, including support to help hard-hit state and local governments maintain essential public services; resources to help close the digital divide so all students can engage in distance learning; hazard pay for essential workers risking their lives; rent and mortgage relief; increased food assistance and child nutrition programs; and help for workers as well as struggling small businesses and non-profit organizations.

I will push to deliver all that relief when the HEROES Act reaches the Senate. But we need additional measures as well:
* To continue to fight the virus and safely re-open the economy, we need to build a massive pandemic response workforce. That's why I've introduced legislation to add hundreds of thousands of national service volunteers to AmeriCorps - to help conduct large-scale testing and contact tracing, and perform other essential functions.

* To increase production of personal protective equipment and testing supplies, I have been pushing the Trump Administration to fully utilize the Defense Production Act (DPA). Unfortunately, their response has been anemic. In 1944, at the height of World War II, we produced 96,270 military aircraft - more than 263 per day. We should be able to produce needed quantities of nasal swabs, reagents and other testing equipment.

* To help small businesses weather the storm and reopen, my Rebuilding Main Street plan leverages the existing Work Share program. It shares payroll costs between hard-hit employers and the federal government, and provides a grant to help employers cover other costs - like rents or mortgages, or changes to stores, restaurants or other structures needed to re-open safely.

* To make health insurance more affordable for families, we need to enhance financial assistance for health plans under the Affordable Care Act (ACA). Unbelievably during this pandemic, the Trump administration is still trying to get the courts to strike down the ACA - a very real threat to millions of Americans' health insurance.

* To supervise the public financing of relief efforts, the Senate and House must provide robust oversight and make sure the help is getting to those who need it most.

Even as we fight for these priorities, we must think about how this pandemic has exposed deep inequities in our society. It has had a disproportionately harmful impact on communities of color and shone a harsh light on disparities in a variety of areas, including our health care systems, access to educational opportunities, and housing. I was focused on these areas before the pandemic, but the need for action is even more urgent now. It's even more essential that we provide universal access to affordable health care, fully fund federal promises to our schools, provide access to affordable housing, and address other key priorities in every part of our state and country. Together, we will weather this storm and build a better Maryland for all.
Chris Van Hollen To learn more about Senator Van Hollen's work to address the COVID-19 crisis, visit [vanhollen.senate.gov/coronavirus](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15266.17104536.4601800.7517223&report_id=&redirect=http%3a%2f%2fvanhollen.senate.gov%2fcoronavirus&redir_log=562382490017282). Everyone counts! Fill out the Census now if you haven't already at [my2020census.gov](my2020census.gov). June 2 is Election Day in Maryland, and I encourage you to vote by mail. Click here for more information and to request your absentee ballot. Everyone can vote by mail. Note that the ballots are incorrectly dated April 28, but will be counted if postmarked by June 2.

---
## Protections and Resources for Marylanders
Here are some helpful resources I've shared in previous newsletters. And you can always reach out to us if you need help with federal agencies or programs. You may call my office at 301-545-1500 or email [assistance@vanhollen.senate.gov](mailto:assistance@vanhollen.senate.gov).
* **Unemployment insurance** (UI): I share the frustration of the many Marylanders who are having difficulty accessing unemployment benefits and the state's new application website. My team and I have been in touch with the Maryland Department of Labor repeatedly, and we will keep monitoring and offering all possible assistance until these issues are fixed.

Congress previously expanded UI to more workers, increased the amount of unemployment payments workers can receive by $600 per week, extended benefits by 13 weeks, and provided funds to help states process applications and get checks out faster.

**Your benefits, including the additional $600/week, will be backdated and paid based on your original eligibility date** , so you will ultimately receive the help you urgently need. However, the backlog and delays are causing severe cash flow problems for many households.

**Unemployment insurance applicants, please note:**

If you are newly eligible for unemployment benefits in Maryland, such as independent contractors, I encourage you to apply at the State of Maryland's new unemployment website, [MDunemployment.com](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15266.17104536.4601800.7517223&report_id=&redirect=http%3a%2f%2fmdunemployment.com%2f&redir_log=074309390446185). Select "Apply for Unemployment Insurance Benefits" in the left hand column. This will take you to the BEACON one-stop application page.

The State's new, one-stop unemployment insurance application is designed to allow Marylanders to file claims for all unemployment programs entirely online. This includes the Pandemic Unemployment Assistance program, the Pandemic Emergency Unemployment Compensation program, and those who were previously required to file by phone like federal employees, members of the military, individuals who have worked in multiple states, and those who have worked for more than 3 employers in the last 18 months.

If you have questions for the unemployment office, try reviewing [their FAQ page](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15266.17104536.4601800.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.dllr.state.md.us%2femployment%2fuicaresfaqs.pdf&redir_log=318923640531391) before calling, because the phone hold times are very long.

* **No evictions:** The state has ordered that no Maryland family or business who suffered a substantial loss of income due to COVID-19 or related closures can be evicted during the coronavirus state of emergency. The obligation to make rent and mortgage payments remains. Landlords may continue to file failure to pay rent cases, which will be considered after the state of emergency ends.

* **No repossessions:** Marylanders' cars, mobile homes, trailers, and house boats cannot be repossessed during the coronavirus emergency. The obligation to make rent and mortgage payments remains. Landlords may continue to file failure to pay rent cases, which will be considered after the state of emergency ends.

* **Senior citizens** seeking information and resources on COVID-19 can [click here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15266.17104536.4601800.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2faging.maryland.gov%2fPages%2fNovel-coronavirus.aspx&redir_log=385359970431391).

* To **find school meals** nearby, visit the Maryland State Department of Education's [meals site](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15266.17104536.4601800.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmars.msde.maryland.gov%2fmars_sitesearch%2f&redir_log=648767416991333).

* To **find child care** , call Maryland's LOCATE referral system at 1-877-261-0060, or [click here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15266.17104536.4601800.7517223&report_id=&redirect=http%3a%2f%2fwww.marylandfamilynetwork.org%2fprograms-services%2flocate%2f&redir_log=074088812453442).

* For **help paying utility bills** , visit [Maryland's Office of Home Energy Programs](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15266.17104536.4601800.7517223&report_id=&redirect=http%3a%2f%2fdhr.maryland.gov%2foffice-of-home-energy-programs%2fhow-do-you-apply%2f&redir_log=584818711733502).

* For **temporary cash assistance** to families with dependent children, [click here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15266.17104536.4601800.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmydhrbenefits.dhr.state.md.us%2fdashboardClient%2f%23%2fhome&redir_log=540010106459415).

* For **state small business help** (separate from the Federal programs listed above), [click here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15266.17104536.4601800.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fcommerce.maryland.gov%2ffund%2fmaryland-small-business-covid-19-emergency-relief-fund-programs&redir_log=548180129753687).

|
---
[Please click here to unsubscribe](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//EsurveyForm.aspx?__cid=SenVanHollen&__sid=100007&__crop=15266.17104536.4601800.7517223)

| |
---
| | | Patriot,

Once again, Nancy Pelosi is out of control! This time she's trying to spend another $3 trillion of taxpayer money bailing out state governments. We don't need Kansas tax dollars being sent to liberal, blue states on the coasts.

[Will you pitch in to help us Take Back the House?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=8b5660271e&e=1050d051da)
