| | **-May 14, 2020-** **-Six days left to apply to vote by mail-** **** Voting by mail is the ONLY way to keep voters and poll workers safe during a global pandemic. Hoosiers have six days left to apply to vote by mail. If you haven't applied yet, we've got you covered. **Here are the three ways to apply:**
1. Fill out your application online at **_[indianavoters.in.gov](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509727/196642844/-1499154792?emci=9da1f95d-648a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=4925535&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=)_**
2. Download the form to mail it in **_[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509728/196642845/1601583050?id=14529&emci=9da1f95d-648a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=4925535&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=)_**.
3. Call the Election Division to request an application: (317) 232-3939

**If you're looking for detailed instructions on how to apply, we have the resources to help: ** Read our short _[**blog post**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509729/196642846/-893062011?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=&emci=814d86e3-2796-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=67770fad-e696-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)_ on everything you need to know about voting in the 2020 primary. Watch our **_[40-second video](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509730/196642847/-803653937?v=HdZpyOfUoAs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=&emci=814d86e3-2796-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=67770fad-e696-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)_** on how to apply to vote by mail online. Watch our video on how to fill out a mail-in application to vote by mail _**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509731/196642848/-803653937?v=MnqlsMN5nVM&emci=b61971b7-b975-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=4925535&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=)**_. Or check out the Vote-by-Mail Flowchart in **_[English](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509732/196642849/773508790?type=3&theater&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=&emci=814d86e3-2796-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=67770fad-e696-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)_** or **_[español](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509733/196642850/1786243407?type=3&theater&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=&emci=814d86e3-2796-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=67770fad-e696-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)_**. _Vote-by-mail outreach is funded by our 100%-grassroots backed, _[**_Vote-by-Mail Outreach Initiative_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509734/196642851/1745149176?refcode=FFF5.14&amount=12&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=) _. You can help us make sure every Hoosier has the tools to vote by mail _[**_here_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509735/196642852/1745149176?refcode=FFF5.14&amount=12&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=) _._ **-Help us write the 2020 platform-** **** Your input from platform hearings online and across the state have guided the first draft of the 2020 platform. Let us know what you think, what's important to highlight, add or enhance.
1. Review the [2020 first draft](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509736/196642853/1039408871?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=&emci=814d86e3-2796-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=67770fad-e696-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535).
2. Submit your comments _**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509737/196642854/-870394518?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=&emci=814d86e3-2796-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=67770fad-e696-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)**_. Be specific, include page and line numbers when you can.

**-Seven days left to apply to be a national delegate-** **** The deadline to apply to be a national delegate is May 22, at NOON EST. And we’re looking for Hoosiers like you to represent our state. This is your chance to amplify your voice in the 2020 presidential primary! Check out our [National Convention page](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509738/196642855/-1977174739?emci=2e61ad99-b793-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=) to find out how you can become a national delegate in just five steps. Then, take four minutes to fill out the [online form](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509739/196642856/879731434?emci=2e61ad99-b793-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=). **-Jim Lucas’ racism has no place in the Statehouse-** **** Over and over, GOP State Rep., Jim Lucas, has used hateful and divisive language. His latest offense came this week when he posted a racist meme on Facebook. Now, Lucas is refusing to apologize. Even members of Lucas’ own party have denounced his barefaced bigotry. Indiana House Speaker Todd Huston (R) called the post “[unacceptable](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509740/196642857/-489110767?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=&emci=814d86e3-2796-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=67770fad-e696-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535).” Still, no GOP official has called for his resignation. Lucas has made it clear: this intolerance is not an isolated incident. It’s concerning that the GOP seems to think there is room for racism in the Statehouse. We’re calling on Lucas to resign because anything short of a resignation is just turning a blind eye to unacceptable behavior. Will you help us show the GOP that racism has no place in our government? Sign on **_[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509741/196642858/-1327725774?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=&emci=814d86e3-2796-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=67770fad-e696-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)_** to call on Lucas to leave. **-Holcomb moves forward with his risky plan-** **** Governor Holcomb is moving forward with his plan to lift COVID-19 restrictions this week. The underprepared, overly-aggressive plan is slated to skyrocket the Indiana [death rate by 543%](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509742/196642859/-1210574831?emci=137509ea-3a91-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=). That’s more than 5,000 _preventable_ deaths. Indiana has the [highest death rate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509743/196642860/-1645735690?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=&emci=814d86e3-2796-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=67770fad-e696-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535) of any states currently reopening. Expert after expert agrees: widespread [testing is the key](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509744/196642861/-1067863872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=&emci=814d86e3-2796-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=67770fad-e696-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535) to reopening the economy; yet, Indiana still falls short of the Trump administration’s [testing threshold](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509745/196642862/889236990?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=&emci=814d86e3-2796-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=67770fad-e696-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535). Our contact tracing plan operates at [less than a quarter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509746/196642863/1017781929?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=&emci=814d86e3-2796-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=67770fad-e696-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535) of the capacity recommended by medical experts, and only 65% of the capacity Holcomb promised. Does this sound like a state ready to reopen? We’re calling on Holcomb to postpone the reopen until he follows public health protocol. You can join us by signing on **_[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509747/196642864/-1920947615?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=&emci=814d86e3-2796-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=67770fad-e696-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)_**. **-Indiana Young Democrats Launch New Brand and Logo-** **** This week, the Indiana Young Democrats (IYD) [announced the launch of a new brand](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17509748/196642865/-403877774?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Nzc3MGZhZC1lNjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDLqxufRM5lgBguq9y-ROLzlv1KGuvl8pimVgbibf9I=&emci=814d86e3-2796-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=67770fad-e696-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535) identity. Among other changes is a revamped logo and website. “The rebranding represents a fresh and progressive organization we are building for our members and candidates,” said Arielle Brandy, President of the Indiana Young Democrats. As the premier youth-led grassroots political organization in the state of Indiana and the official youth caucus of our party, their rebranding signals a progressive shift in vision and strategy over the course of the previous year to the present. IYD’s initiatives include fostering a statewide network of Young Democrats through chapter outreach and growth, recruiting and electing more Democrats throughout Indiana, and partnering with national organizations to ensure candidates have all the resources and tools they need to flip seats. In all, the branding embodies an organization that is reinventing itself but is still very committed to its progressive roots and ideas. The new identity builds upon its history of young Democrat Hoosiers, from the late former U.S. Senator Birch Bayh to our very own, Former Presidential candidate and Mayor of South Bend Pete Buttigieg, who has continued to champion the young, progressive cause. clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | -May 14, 2020- -Six days left to apply to vote by mail- ** Voting by mail is the ONLY way to keep voters and poll workers safe during a global pandemic. Hoosiers have six days left to apply to vote by mail. If you haven't applied yet, we've got you covered. Here are the three ways to apply: 1. Fill out your application online at = 2. Download the form to mail it in =. 3. Call the Election Division to request an application: (317) 232-3939 If you're looking for detailed instructions on how to apply, we have the resources to help: Read our short on everything you need to know about voting in the 2020 primary. Watch our on how to apply to vote by mail online. Watch our video on how to fill out a mail-in application to vote by mail =. Or check out the Vote-by-Mail Flowchart in or . Vote-by-mail outreach is funded by our 100%-grassroots backed, = . You can help us make sure every Hoosier has the tools to vote by mail = . -Help us write the 2020 platform- Your input from platform hearings online and across the state have guided the first draft of the 2020 platform. Let us know what you think, what's important to highlight, add or enhance. 1. Review the . 2. Submit your comments . Be specific, include page and line numbers when you can. -Seven days left to apply to be a national delegate- The deadline to apply to be a national delegate is May 22, at NOON EST. And we’re looking for Hoosiers like you to represent our state. This is your chance to amplify your voice in the 2020 presidential primary! Check out our = to find out how you can become a national delegate in just five steps. Then, take four minutes to fill out the =. -Jim Lucas’ racism has no place in the Statehouse- Over and over, GOP State Rep., Jim Lucas, has used hateful and divisive language. His latest offense came this week when he posted a racist meme on Facebook. Now, Lucas is refusing to apologize. Even members of Lucas’ own party have denounced his barefaced bigotry. Indiana House Speaker Todd Huston (R) called the post “.” Still, no GOP official has called for his resignation. Lucas has made it clear: this intolerance is not an isolated incident. It’s concerning that the GOP seems to think there is room for racism in the Statehouse. We’re calling on Lucas to resign because anything short of a resignation is just turning a blind eye to unacceptable behavior. Will you help us show the GOP that racism has no place in our government? Sign on to call on Lucas to leave. -Holcomb moves forward with his risky plan- Governor Holcomb is moving forward with his plan to lift COVID-19 restrictions this week. The underprepared, overly-aggressive plan is slated to skyrocket the Indiana =. That’s more than 5,000 preventable deaths. Indiana has the of any states currently reopening. Expert after expert agrees: widespread to reopening the economy; yet, Indiana still falls short of the Trump administration’s . Our contact tracing plan operates at of the capacity recommended by medical experts, and only 65% of the capacity Holcomb promised. Does this sound like a state ready to reopen? We’re calling on Holcomb to postpone the reopen until he follows public health protocol. You can join us by signing on . -Indiana Young Democrats Launch New Brand and Logo- This week, the Indiana Young Democrats (IYD) identity. Among other changes is a revamped logo and website. “The rebranding represents a fresh and progressive organization we are building for our members and candidates,” said Arielle Brandy, President of the Indiana Young Democrats. As the premier youth-led grassroots political organization in the state of Indiana and the official youth caucus of our party, their rebranding signals a progressive shift in vision and strategy over the course of the previous year to the present. IYD’s initiatives include fostering a statewide network of Young Democrats through chapter outreach and growth, recruiting and electing more Democrats throughout Indiana, and partnering with national organizations to ensure candidates have all the resources and tools they need to flip seats. In all, the branding embodies an organization that is reinventing itself but is still very committed to its progressive roots and ideas. The new identity builds upon its history of young Democrat Hoosiers, from the late former U.S. Senator Birch Bayh to our very own, Former Presidential candidate and Mayor of South Bend Pete Buttigieg, who has continued to champion the young, progressive cause. Watch the launch video . For more information, visit . -Resources- You have 6 DAYS to apply to vote by mail in the June 2 primary. Apply by May 21 online . Friend,

clean_body: I'm personally following up on my team's email yesterday asking for help. Friend -- I'm personally following up on my team's email yesterday asking for help. Nancy Pelosi and the far left are dumping money from a SuperPAC into this district to expand their Democrat Majority this Fall. Friend, my team explained to you why we can't afford to lose. And I won't mince words, == ==. Thanks, Congressman Rodney Davis \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Michael S. (Team Rodney) Date: Thurs, May 14th, 2020 at 8:00 PM Subject: We can't let the far left replace Rodney Davis! Friend, Nancy Pelosi and the far left are adamant on taking back this critical Republican held seat. They will stop at nothing to expand their Democrat majority in Congress to roll out a liberal agenda filled with government run healthcare, the Green New Deal, and tax increases. We need representatives in Congress who are focused on doing what is right for their districts instead of party politics. Rodney Davis has been a leader in Illinois putting this district first each and every day. == Rodney has been a staunch leader in Congress, leading the way to finding solutions towards innovating our economy and infrastructure, all while working with community leaders to make sure their voices are heard. Even now, Rodney continues to work as a leader to find meaningful solutions during this pandemic. He is putting people before politics because it is what we need most right now. While Rodney is putting his district first, Nancy Pelosi and the far left are using a SuperPac to funnel money into this district to support Rodney's opponent. We need your help to fight back! == == == == == == Thank you, Michael, Team Rodney Downstate Illinois is the #1 target for Democrats this year, can we count on you to rush in $15, $10, $5, or even $1, to help Rodney win this race? **== ==** Paid for and authorized by Rodney for Congress == PO BOX 344 Taylorville, IL 62568 This message reflects the opinions and representations of the Rodney for Congress. **Check out our newsletter below for important information on the upcoming primary election, opportunities to join Team Eugene, and updates from the (digital) campaign trail!** | _**Primary Election Update**_
➡️ **The rescheduled primary election will be held on Tuesday, June 2nd.**

➡️ Polling places will change or be consolidated due to COVID-19. These are the changes made so far:

➡️ **The last day to apply for a mail-in or absentee ballot is Tuesday, May 26th.** Voting by mail is the easiest way to vote securely from home. | **[Request a mail-in ballot »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17510400/196657076/-1813083118?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjcyYWQyNC1lYjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3XePW2srgNuWRVXZg5v4D6wI0UNhgTg9CeFCRUVljh8=&emci=4dd5f296-c496-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=9272ad24-eb96-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10203249#/OnlineAbsenteeBegin)**

_**What we’ve been up to**_ We might not be able to gather in person, but we’ve been hosting Zoom town halls and meet-and-greets to hear directly from people in our community and spread Eugene’s message. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17510401/196657077/460726911?amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2020.05.15_b1_te_all-nd&refcode2=9272ad24-eb96-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjcyYWQyNC1lYjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3XePW2srgNuWRVXZg5v4D6wI0UNhgTg9CeFCRUVljh8=) **We’re hosting another town hall TONIGHT at 5:30 PM. This is the most important thing we can be doing prior to the primary election! Sign up to join us here:** [May 16th & 17th »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17510403/196657079/2017010399?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjcyYWQyNC1lYjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3XePW2srgNuWRVXZg5v4D6wI0UNhgTg9CeFCRUVljh8=&emci=4dd5f296-c496-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=9272ad24-eb96-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10203249)

[May 23rd & 24th »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17510404/196657080/2017075935?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjcyYWQyNC1lYjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3XePW2srgNuWRVXZg5v4D6wI0UNhgTg9CeFCRUVljh8=&emci=4dd5f296-c496-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=9272ad24-eb96-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10203249)

While our campaign looks a little different these days (the entire team is following CDC guidelines and working from home!), we haven’t slowed down in our efforts to send Eugene to Congress. Check out our newsletter below for important information on the upcoming primary election, opportunities to join Team Eugene, and updates from the (digital) campaign trail! | Primary Election Update ➡️ The rescheduled primary election will be held on Tuesday, June 2nd. ➡️ Polling places will change or be consolidated due to COVID-19. This is the most important thing we can be doing prior to the primary election! Sign up to join us here: GOTV Between May 30th and Election Day, June 2nd, we will be launching a huge push to call and text voters in the 10th district to ensure everyone has had the opportunity to make their voices heard either by mailing in their ballot or voting in person. Sign up to join us for a scheduled shift (or a few!) here: Eugene’s latest endorsements We’re not the only ones fired up to send a proven leader like Eugene to Congress. name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: National Day of Action, Make Washington take a pay cut, and so much more this week
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20136-652afa41476d45e59fe7108bc2cb8662/82/441/90b1ceee-df08-4701-87a9-d802d35f2034)** America is safely starting to re-open. For weeks we have been pushing to safely re-open our country to let the American people return to work, and now we are beginning to see just that. Cities, counties, and states across our nation are starting to ease lockdown restrictions, allowing businesses to re-open, Americans to return to work, and our economy to come back to life. This is the only practical long-term solution to the problem we now face, but Congressional Democrats just don’t seem to understand that. Earlier this week, Nancy Pelosi & Congressional Democrats released their proposal for a $3 trillion Phase 4 bailout package. Although it was called a Coronavirus “relief” bill, this bill was obviously not intended to provide relief to the American people. Instead Nancy Pelosi & her fellow Democrats, once again, tried to exploit the global pandemic to promote and fund their political agenda. From blue state bailouts, to a bailout of the US Postal Service, to nullification of voter ID laws, Democrats released a 1,815 page wish-list of socialist policy proposals. The bill will obviously go nowhere, even if it passes along party lines in the House. Just like the Democrats’ partisan impeachment, it will be stopped in the Senate. Additional bailouts are not the answer, and we shouldn’t even entertain the idea of another dime of partisan spending. The path forward is clear... It’s time to re-open America and let our great American workers work again! | |
---
National Day of Action!

**Tuesday, May 19th is Call Your Governor Day!** [Call your Governor](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTM2LTY1MmFmYTQxNDc2ZDQ1ZTU5ZmU3MTA4YmMyY2I4NjYy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1RQUEEtR292ZXJub3ItQ29udGFjdC1JbmZvcm1hdGlvbi5wZGY_bWlkPTQyMDE2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=NS1HLCFiyliVEOUUmq4SeQ) with one of these messages, depending on the situation in your state:
* If your Governor has begun reopening the state, call to say thank you!
* If your Governor is maintaining the lockdowns, call to say it’s time to reopen!

|
---
As Americans are working hard to reopen, we also want to protect those at highest risk. We are all learning how to balance lives and livelihoods.

I have a request from some very important people in DC. They would like to know more about what is happening on the ground in areas that are starting to reopen - success stories if you will - about the businesses who have reopened and those who are working, shopping, and doing business in those areas.

If you are an employee or a business owner who has been back to work or if you have been shopping, to your doctor, to get your hair, nails, etc. done, [will you please take 5 - 10 minutes to fill out this form and tell me about your experiences?](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTM2LTY1MmFmYTQxNDc2ZDQ1ZTU5ZmU3MTA4YmMyY2I4NjYy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC8xb3lFdUU2Skc3dGp0S0UtTVRlVktqUExJM2JtMDZ6Y0o4MzFFUk1mRnpNZy9lZGl0P21pZD00MjAxNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=fK25f3WAOf_zcKiS0zudig) **This is a time-sensitive request.**
[ TELL US YOUR THOUGHTS ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTM2LTY1MmFmYTQxNDc2ZDQ1ZTU5ZmU3MTA4YmMyY2I4NjYy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC8xb3lFdUU2Skc3dGp0S0UtTVRlVktqUExJM2JtMDZ6Y0o4MzFFUk1mRnpNZy9lZGl0P21pZD00MjAxNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=fGjV-nlRKOH9TrnqYjYCLg)
|
---
In response to the economic crisis we currently face, we are launching the **[Balance the Pain Petition](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTM2LTY1MmFmYTQxNDc2ZDQ1ZTU5ZmU3MTA4YmMyY2I4NjYy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvYmFsYW5jZXBhaW4vP21pZD00MjAxNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=_X9g9yDRSQSBybQGb3fX9A)**.

Our message is clear: We, the American people, are experiencing the worst economic crisis in almost a century – a crisis caused not by a virus, but by clumsy, onerous government-imposed lockdowns on what are offensively called “non-essential” businesses and their “non-essential” jobs.

If the American people are forced to take a pay cut due to government-imposed lockdowns, Washington elites should too.

**[Make Washington take a pay cut, sign the petition today.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTM2LTY1MmFmYTQxNDc2ZDQ1ZTU5ZmU3MTA4YmMyY2I4NjYy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvYmFsYW5jZXBhaW4vP21pZD00MjAxNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=FkN5nQuuZija8GBiHNKZXg)**

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTM2LTY1MmFmYTQxNDc2ZDQ1ZTU5ZmU3MTA4YmMyY2I4NjYy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvYmFsYW5jZXBhaW4vP21pZD00MjAxNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=TJ7AxUoZDyVV3eXrIFJBWg)

We, the American people, are experiencing the worst economic crisis in almost a century – a crisis caused not by a virus, but by clumsy, onerous government-imposed lockdowns on what are offensively called “non-essential” businesses and their “non-essential” jobs. **[Sign the petition...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTM2LTY1MmFmYTQxNDc2ZDQ1ZTU5ZmU3MTA4YmMyY2I4NjYy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvYmFsYW5jZXBhaW4vP21pZD00MjAxNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=kpxAbi0m_2FU7du1T-LulA)**
|
---
Are there any two words in the English language more depressing than “closed indefinitely”? If there are, I’m certainly not aware of them...

As our nation struggles to deal with the government’s response to the COVID-19 virus, many have lost jobs, many have lost patience, and – perhaps most importantly – many have lost hope.

That means one of the most important things our national leaders can do is to speak to us in positive terms about the hopeful future they see for us when we come out of the current crisis.

That’s why [I’m proposing a new communication strategy](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTM2LTY1MmFmYTQxNDc2ZDQ1ZTU5ZmU3MTA4YmMyY2I4NjYy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlaXRiYXJ0LmNvbS9wb2xpdGljcy8yMDIwLzA1LzEzL2plbm55LWJldGgtbWFydGluLWEtY29tbXVuaWNhdGlvbi1zdHJhdGVneS10by1yZW9wZW4tdGhlLWNvdW50cnkvP21pZD00MjAxNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=oUfsYc3nuh0VXsuPRgO5jw) to re-open the country.

clean_body: America is safely starting to re-open. For weeks we have been pushing to safely re-open our country to let the American people return to work, and now we are beginning to see just that. Cities, counties, and states across our nation are starting to ease lockdown restrictions, allowing businesses to re-open, Americans to return to work, and our economy to come back to life. This is the only practical long-term solution to the problem we now face, but Congressional Democrats just don’t seem to understand that. Earlier this week, Nancy Pelosi & Congressional Democrats released their proposal for a $3 trillion Phase 4 bailout package. Although it was called a Coronavirus “relief” bill, this bill was obviously not intended to provide relief to the American people. Instead Nancy Pelosi & her fellow Democrats, once again, tried to exploit the global pandemic to promote and fund their political agenda. From blue state bailouts, to a bailout of the US Postal Service, to nullification of voter ID laws, Democrats released a 1,815 page wish-list of socialist policy proposals. The bill will obviously go nowhere, even if it passes along party lines in the House. Just like the Democrats’ partisan impeachment, it will be stopped in the Senate. Additional bailouts are not the answer, and we shouldn’t even entertain the idea of another dime of partisan spending. The path forward is clear... It’s time to re-open America and let our great American workers work again! | | National Day of Action! Tuesday, May 19th is Call Your Governor Day! with one of these messages, depending on the situation in your state: If your Governor has begun reopening the state, call to say thank you! name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Friend, I need you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Let me explain...
Friend,
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to Reverend Raphael Warnock's campaign for U.S. Senate in Georgia. **But first, let me explain why I am proud to endorse him and why your support is so critical.**
In 2018, we built a diverse coalition of hardworking folks from all over Georgia, especially Georgians from marginalized communities who felt unseen and unheard. Our fight was rooted in the belief that poverty is immoral, that Georgians deserve access to affordable health care and that the economy ought to work for everyone.
The fact is, people in the White House and the U.S. Senate are failing Georgians of every political party, every race and every region.
The Republican Party's divisive agenda - and systematic voter suppression - goes against everything we stand for as Americans. But here's what gives me hope: All around the country, good people - including many folks who have never been involved with politics before - are stepping up to fight back and defend American values. We have the grassroots energy we need to restore this nation's democracy - and if we all do our part in 2020 to elect leaders who share these values, I know we can make our vision for the country a reality.
That's why I am so excited Reverend Raphael Warnock, a champion for Georgians in the fight for justice, announced he is running for U.S. Senate. Reverend Warnock is a strong leader, a pastor and an advocate - and he would be the first black senator our state has ever elected. **[If you are as ready as I am to support Reverend Warnock's campaign, please give $5 or more right now so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats in 2020.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7a7/288179be/b8f7029/348ea216/1520969621/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjI3LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk227-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Reverend Warnock knows the incredible movement we built in Georgia in 2018, and he's determined to build the energy we need all the way to the ballot box in November. He's ready to fight voter suppression, ensure that health care is protected and expanded and break barriers to opportunity so that future generations know that the sky is the limit.
For the past 15 years, I have watched Reverend Warnock lead on issues of social justice, economic access and voting rights. We stood shoulder to shoulder on the toughest fights, against opponents who used their power to belittle and erase their fellow Georgians. He's dedicated his life to public service, and I know _without a doubt_ that he will be a strong advocate for folks in every corner of our state.
**But if we are going to build momentum and flip Georgia blue in 2020, we need to show Reverend Warnock - and a Republican Party that thinks they can steal this seat by spending millions of dollars and suppressing the vote - that we have a grassroots movement strong enough to win. That is why I need supporters like YOU to help us get this campaign off the ground. **
**[So please, friend, will you give $5 now- as much as you can spare - to help Reverend Warnock win this Senate seat, flip Georgia blue and ensure our constitutional rights are protected in the years to come? ](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7a7/288179be/b8f7029/348ea216/1520969621/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjI3LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk227-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you for your support.
Stacey Abrams

clean_body: Let me explain... Friend, In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to Reverend Raphael Warnock's campaign for U.S. Senate in Georgia. But first, let me explain why I am proud to endorse him and why your support is so critical. In 2018, we built a diverse coalition of hardworking folks from all over Georgia, especially Georgians from marginalized communities who felt unseen and unheard. Our fight was rooted in the belief that poverty is immoral, that Georgians deserve access to affordable health care and that the economy ought to work for everyone. The fact is, people in the White House and the U.S. Senate are failing Georgians of every political party, every race and every region. The Republican Party's divisive agenda - and systematic voter suppression - goes against everything we stand for as Americans. But here's what gives me hope: All around the country, good people - including many folks who have never been involved with politics before - are stepping up to fight back and defend American values. We have the grassroots energy we need to restore this nation's democracy - and if we all do our part in 2020 to elect leaders who share these values, I know we can make our vision for the country a reality. That's why I am so excited Reverend Raphael Warnock, a champion for Georgians in the fight for justice, announced he is running for U.S. Senate. Reverend Warnock is a strong leader, a pastor and an advocate - and he would be the first black senator our state has ever elected. "" Reverend Warnock knows the incredible movement we built in Georgia in 2018, and he's determined to build the energy we need all the way to the ballot box in November. He's ready to fight voter suppression, ensure that health care is protected and expanded and break barriers to opportunity so that future generations know that the sky is the limit. For the past 15 years, I have watched Reverend Warnock lead on issues of social justice, economic access and voting rights. We stood shoulder to shoulder on the toughest fights, against opponents who used their power to belittle and erase their fellow Georgians. He's dedicated his life to public service, and I know without a doubt that he will be a strong advocate for folks in every corner of our state. But if we are going to build momentum and flip Georgia blue in 2020, we need to show Reverend Warnock - and a Republican Party that thinks they can steal this seat by spending millions of dollars and suppressing the vote - that we have a grassroots movement strong enough to win. That is why I need supporters like YOU to help us get this campaign off the ground. "" Thank you for your support. Stacey Abrams | ""

subject: Wow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|

One thing is for certain - **this race will come down to the wire in November.** That is why this mid-May goal is SO important. We must improve our fundraising numbers in order to stand a chance against the Far Left groups that are infiltrating Maine.

name: Team Hinson
subject: FWD: One year ago today I announced my candidacy!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
A year ago yesterday, Ashley Hinson announced her candidacy to take on far left and out of touch liberal Abby Finkenauer!
Friend --

A year ago yesterday, Ashley Hinson announced her candidacy to take on far left and out of touch liberal Abby Finkenauer!
Our team has gained so much momentum since then. We have had campaign events up and down the district, held virtual events during this current Coronavirus pandemic, and continue to gain the trust of Iowa voters every day.
We have even earned the endorsements of Republican leaders like **Republican Whip Steve Scalise** and **Iowa Senator Joni Ernst!** And just last week, conservative grassroots advocacy group **Americans for Prosperity Action** endorsed our campaign!
Check out Ashley's email from yesterday and see why our campaign is on a path for success in November. [_**And if you can, please chip in $15, $10, $5, or even $1 to show Ashley your support today!**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oU9PZVCRczNVzKXrlAlZDRww_htiGDfiLUW01H3XUBlxguJhS4eKch28Os0WjZ1bm6Bp-LTcH1s1OKm67HORWMWrLH-H_GffIyaQQp_53Pyorh7i1p3Oue_W-1fWbeuFTA8SMJGIvEX2KtB_rb2R8nYyUricjgPif6IXA2naH5vFxu3pmEWkCgS5uAnXrTlcrkSB2JRwk46KqEr_9J3_nPdOFEmzPUNNdv0a4rQpZmpIadIQ4Ce3ONL8OMUQCVK5lLlHsEsmh0zA5FhXvJQlWhhBBgpGhdPBBe-CmolICTgPtlKqFlwyXsehrFvXmBaUf2WhYsOwxge2dfqQGdfORsk833vq9PXM9NctB3qys7Et5NYHCmhLwXsu6NSnBKwf4olWWpL3qyQ=&c=-b7K8pI6ZCZWbArX8YCEoRHOBJlOcVMfVpaePRrvX1m6CaXJ86U7Yg==&ch=Oh3MujxjYoYZXFgsgyPnW24Nbux7oQWESCt6faZBGMaTBQlu-lrLiQ==)

Subject: One year ago today I announced my candidacy
Sender: Ashley Hinson
Date: May 14, 2020
Friend,
It's been exactly one year ago today that I announced I was running to replace far left liberal Abby Finkenauer. Iowans deserve more than a representative [_**who is OK with voting with Nancy Pelosi and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez 91% of the time for their extreme policy agenda**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oU9PZVCRczNVzKXrlAlZDRww_htiGDfiLUW01H3XUBlxguJhS4eKch28Os0WjZ1bm6Bp-LTcH1s1OKm67HORWMWrLH-H_GffIyaQQp_53Pyorh7i1p3Oue_W-1fWbeuFTA8SMJGIvEX2KtB_rb2R8nYyUricjgPif6IXA2naH5vFxu3pmEWkCgS5uAnXrTlcrkSB2JRwk46KqEr_9J3_nPdOFEmzPUNNdv0a4rQpZmpIadIQ4Ce3ONL8OMUQCVK5lLlHsEsmh0zA5FhXvJQlWhhBBgpGhdPBBe-CmolICTgPtlKqFlwyXsehrFvXmBaUf2WhYsOwxge2dfqQGdfORsk833vq9PXM9NctB3qys7Et5NYHCmhLwXsu6NSnBKwf4olWWpL3qyQ=&c=-b7K8pI6ZCZWbArX8YCEoRHOBJlOcVMfVpaePRrvX1m6CaXJ86U7Yg==&ch=Oh3MujxjYoYZXFgsgyPnW24Nbux7oQWESCt6faZBGMaTBQlu-lrLiQ==).
I believe I speak for this district when I say that we are **NOT** OK with that. [_**We are not OK with supporting a liberal agenda filled with the tax increases to front items like the Green New Deal, government run healthcare, and other socialist wishlist items**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oU9PZVCRczNVzKXrlAlZDRww_htiGDfiLUW01H3XUBlxguJhS4eKch28Os0WjZ1bm6Bp-LTcH1s1OKm67HORWMWrLH-H_GffIyaQQp_53Pyorh7i1p3Oue_W-1fWbeuFTA8SMJGIvEX2KtB_rb2R8nYyUricjgPif6IXA2naH5vFxu3pmEWkCgS5uAnXrTlcrkSB2JRwk46KqEr_9J3_nPdOFEmzPUNNdv0a4rQpZmpIadIQ4Ce3ONL8OMUQCVK5lLlHsEsmh0zA5FhXvJQlWhhBBgpGhdPBBe-CmolICTgPtlKqFlwyXsehrFvXmBaUf2WhYsOwxge2dfqQGdfORsk833vq9PXM9NctB3qys7Et5NYHCmhLwXsu6NSnBKwf4olWWpL3qyQ=&c=-b7K8pI6ZCZWbArX8YCEoRHOBJlOcVMfVpaePRrvX1m6CaXJ86U7Yg==&ch=Oh3MujxjYoYZXFgsgyPnW24Nbux7oQWESCt6faZBGMaTBQlu-lrLiQ==).
Congresswoman Finkenauer is severely out of touch and I refuse to stand on the sidelines while she continues to lead the families of Iowa astray. That is precisely why I decided to run for this seat.
As an award-winning news reporter, I was on the front lines investigating and reporting on breaking news every day. I took my job seriously, I needed to ensure that Iowans were getting the necessary information to keep them safe and informed.
**But, I knew that I could do more for my community**. That's why in 2016, I ran to represent my district in the State House and became the first woman ever to win a blue House seat as a Republican.
As a state representative, I've balanced budgets, improved our schools, and worked to grow our economy. [_**Unlike Congresswoman Finkenauer, when elected I promise to use Iowa common sense to get Congress back to work for the American people**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oU9PZVCRczNVzKXrlAlZDRww_htiGDfiLUW01H3XUBlxguJhS4eKch28Os0WjZ1bm6Bp-LTcH1s1OKm67HORWMWrLH-H_GffIyaQQp_53Pyorh7i1p3Oue_W-1fWbeuFTA8SMJGIvEX2KtB_rb2R8nYyUricjgPif6IXA2naH5vFxu3pmEWkCgS5uAnXrTlcrkSB2JRwk46KqEr_9J3_nPdOFEmzPUNNdv0a4rQpZmpIadIQ4Ce3ONL8OMUQCVK5lLlHsEsmh0zA5FhXvJQlWhhBBgpGhdPBBe-CmolICTgPtlKqFlwyXsehrFvXmBaUf2WhYsOwxge2dfqQGdfORsk833vq9PXM9NctB3qys7Et5NYHCmhLwXsu6NSnBKwf4olWWpL3qyQ=&c=-b7K8pI6ZCZWbArX8YCEoRHOBJlOcVMfVpaePRrvX1m6CaXJ86U7Yg==&ch=Oh3MujxjYoYZXFgsgyPnW24Nbux7oQWESCt6faZBGMaTBQlu-lrLiQ==).

Friend -- A year ago yesterday, Ashley Hinson announced her candidacy to take on far left and out of touch liberal Abby Finkenauer! Our team has gained so much momentum since then. We have had campaign events up and down the district, held virtual events during this current Coronavirus pandemic, and continue to gain the trust of Iowa voters every day. We have even earned the endorsements of Republican leaders like Republican Whip Steve Scalise and Iowa Senator Joni Ernst! And just last week, conservative grassroots advocacy group Americans for Prosperity Action endorsed our campaign! Check out Ashley's email from yesterday and see why our campaign is on a path for success in November. == Thank you, Team Hinson \-----Forwarding message---- Subject: One year ago today I announced my candidacy Sender: Ashley Hinson Date: May 14, 2020 Friend, It's been exactly one year ago today that I announced I was running to replace far left liberal Abby Finkenauer. Iowans deserve more than a representative ==. I believe I speak for this district when I say that we are NOT OK with that. ==. Our opponent, Bill Hagerty -- who was hand-picked by Mitch McConnell -- has already been bought and paid for by Washington politicians.
Hagerty is in this race to serve their special-interest agenda instead of Tennesseans. In fact, he's __ the _**only Senate candidate**_ serving on one of Trump's coronavirus advisory boards, because he's proven he'll rubber stamp anything they ask him to.
McConnell and the agenda of their special interest bankrollers have disproportionately hurt Tennesseans, and now, they want to turn a blind eye to science even though this public health crisis is still devastating our state.
We can't afford more of their failed leadership.
[_**James isn 't bought or paid for -- he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, and because we're postponing our in-person events, we're relying on your generosity more than ever. If you can, chip in before the FEC mid-quarter deadline at 11:59 p.m. this Sunday.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa101/18d6a294/4ca6795d/26d6042d/1851007178/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA1MTUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibWMifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200515?refcode=jme200515_mc&recurring=true")

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The U.S. Postal Service is now more important than ever, and Trump wants to put an unqualified donor in charge.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
We need a qualified Postmaster General who's committed to strengthening the USPS and serving our country, not a partisan cheerleader -- especially now that we're staring down an election where million | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525712/45c30650/1cb874b20/66e92404/490706223/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Quick: Name the U.S. Postmaster General.

Drawing a blank? If so, I understand -- they don't usually make the headlines. Typically, they're public servants who quietly rise through the ranks of the U.S. Postal Service before getting the top job.

And their nonpartisan work is powerfully important, especially right now. We're counting on the USPS to deliver essential medicine and supplies, help keep us connected, and even protect our very democracy by making it possible to vote by mail.

But you know who's been appointed as the Trump administration's new Postmaster General? An unqualified political donor named Louis DeJoy -- and he's making headlines for all the wrong reasons.

First, he's never spent a day working at the USPS, but he has donated more than $2 million to the Trump campaign and other Republicans since 2016. He's like the Betsy DeVos of the Postal Service -- no experience in the classroom, but plenty of practice writing big checks to the GOP.

Second, he might be clearing house already. Just this week, we got word that the Deputy Postmaster General has also resigned, paving the way for DeJoy to pick his own #2 -- who'll work on vote-by-mail.

**We need a qualified Postmaster General who's committed to strengthening the USPS and serving our country, not a partisan cheerleader -- especially now that we're staring down an election where millions could vote by mail.**

**[Add your name if you oppose Louis DeJoy's appointment, and let's fight side by side to shore up the USPS and keep Trump from turning it into a political pawn.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525712/45c30650/1cb874b20/66e92407/490706223/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVIwOFBfU0dOX1ZPVF9FXzIwMjAwNTE1X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-protect-the-postal-service?source=EMR08P_SGN_VOT_E_20200515_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Like a lot of organizations, the USPS is under heavy financial pressure right now. Congress needs to take action to shore up the Postal Service, and the agency needs experienced, independent leadership.

A strong USPS is vital to one of our biggest priorities this year: making it possible for every eligible voter to stay safe without staying silent in our democracy. That means enhancing the safety of in-person voting and expanding vote-by-mail -- and that depends on the Postal Service.

We've already seen mail carriers and other USPS workers risk their own health to ensure that America keeps running. They deserve a leader who will honor their hard work by running an agency free of political interference.

But the president of the American Postal Workers Union -- a vital institution fighting for public-sector workers -- has released a statement saying he was "deeply concerned" with the process behind a right-wing megadonor ending up as Postmaster General.

There's a lot at stake for the USPS right now, and a lot of decisions to be made about its future. We need to protect its workers and connect our country with continued service, not higher rates, cutbacks, or privatization.

**The Trump administration is once again putting another wealthy donor into a position that demands real experience and leadership -- and at a time when survival of the USPS couldn't be more critical.

This is corruption at its worst. I'm going to keep fighting to root corruption out of our government and put power in the hands of the people -- but I can't do it alone. It's going to take a grassroots movement, and that's exactly what we're building together.**

**[If you agree that the job of Postmaster General is too important right now to be filled by an inexperienced partisan donor, add your name.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525712/45c30650/1cb874b20/66e92407/490706223/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVIwOFBfU0dOX1ZPVF9FXzIwMjAwNTE1X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-protect-the-postal-service?source=EMR08P_SGN_VOT_E_20200515_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525712/45c30650/1cb874b20/66e92407/490706223/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVIwOFBfU0dOX1ZPVF9FXzIwMjAwNTE1X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-protect-the-postal-service?source=EMR08P_SGN_VOT_E_20200515_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

We wanted to make sure that you were one of the first to see Cory Gardner's FIRST TV ad, which is hitting airwaves TODAY!
_Cory Gardner is a fifth generation Coloradan whose 2014 Senate victory was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Cory 's win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats' empty promises. And in the last six years, Cory has tirelessly fought to uplift his fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating.

And this year, Cory is facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue._

clean_body: We wanted to make sure that you were one of the first to see Cory Gardner's FIRST TV ad, which is hitting airwaves TODAY! Cory Gardner is a fifth generation Coloradan whose 2014 Senate victory was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Cory 's win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats' empty promises. And in the last six years, Cory has tirelessly fought to uplift his fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating. And this year, Cory is facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue. Friend, We wanted to make sure that you were one of the first to see Cory Gardner's FIRST TV ad, which is hitting airwaves TODAY! DIGITAL EXCLUSIVE FIRST LOOK == Our new ad is an important reminder that despite everything happening in the world today, Cory's work on behalf of Coloradans and Americans everywhere isn't on hold. Cory is both working with President Trump and across the aisle. And, he's continuing to lead by leveraging his relationships with foreign allies like South Korea and Taiwan to secure more tests, more masks, and more resources for Coloradans. In short, while there is work to be done and the road ahead is uncertain, we know we can count on Cory to guide us through these challenges, that he 's the right person to serve Colorado and produce real change for our state. Check out the new ad == and remember to forward it to friends and family who believe in Colorado and believe in Cory's fight for our future! == PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE | | Cory Gardner for Senate | 9227 E LINCOLN AVE #200-234, Lone Tree, CO 80124 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17512092/196682989/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjE4Yzc2ZC1mNzk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O15aSDKvunktB493rYaEhyoKYxPuttkfR649FTmdPXk=&emci=d56b8cf7-f296-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c218c76d-f796-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864)
Friend, we'll get straight to the point.

Right now, we're about 63% of the way to our $10,000 mid-quarter fundraising goal. With the deadline set to hit tonight, that's further behind than we expected to be. The good news is we still have time to catch up:

**If two supporters from 18326 chip in right now, we’ll be back on track to hitting our goal.**

**[Will you be one of the two donors we need from 18326 to chip in before tonight's deadline? Any amount will go a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17512093/196682990/1147193815?refcode=em-200515-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjE4Yzc2ZC1mNzk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O15aSDKvunktB493rYaEhyoKYxPuttkfR649FTmdPXk=)**
**[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q2-2020?refcode=em-200515-all-a)** We can't afford to come up short on tonight’s goal. Here are a couple of reasons why: **1\. We need to pick up our voter outreach efforts.** We're picking up our phone-banking and texting programs. We also need to ramp up communication via mailers and digital advertising. That costs money!

**2\. Our opponent is self-funding her campaign to the tune of several million.** That's not an attack. That's not a smear. It's a fact. Our opponent spent _$4.3 million_ getting through the primary and is poised to spend even more in the General. That doesn't include the millions being spent by the super PAC supporting her. We have a huge opportunity to elect a progressive unifier in CA-53, but it depends on hitting these benchmarks. And since we’re refusing support from corporate PACs, we can't do this without your help:

name: Team Scheller
subject: Radio Ad: Scheller For Congress Launches New Ad Detailing Dean Browning’s Liberal Record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
Scheller for Congress today announced the launch of the “Dean Browning: Too Liberal Too Long” campaign, detailing Dean Browning’s long liberal record **RADIO AD: SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS LAUNCHES NEW AD DETAILING DEAN BROWNING’S LIBERAL RECORD** **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE ** Contact: Ryan Reynolds press@schellerforcongress.com May 15, 2020 **ALLENTOWN, Pa.** – Scheller for Congress today announced the launch of the “Dean Browning: Too Liberal Too Long” campaign, detailing Dean Browning’s long liberal record of tax raising and anti-gun rights policies.
The radio ad highlights Dean Browning's series of tax and spend votes on the Lehigh County Commission, where Browning sided with liberal Democrats instead of conservatives and allowed government spending to increase by millions of dollars.
This ad comes on the heels of Scheller’s ad promoting her fiscally conservative record of cutting taxes and saving taxpayers over $40 million due to her leadership on the Lehigh County Commission. The ad also describes Browning’s disturbing issue with women in the workplace. In 2018 Dean was [directly named in a sexual discrimination](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=0ec547ace4e441568df598837445ab3d&_e=cCbCZ_awmamlRTWOeN4H3zuqOZYtFYPW-lveP685KfwJFeUDuGI76vQLEvp71EYPs4dcAqzu0YM-XWg-B7omGu64VaEF-A78UsuLVMkpMqdWJRLvwg8nj9yqsPtO3t_rPMFx79uWqRtW-U1Nvwer_JLIZLfpnDmTHTzji175vUg_rSgL4IyTLUXG6Gs4NLXvP-KjaxdrZaWdTutsCu6jgbn0O0SFlsx3NMFvqFUO2Muvvn4wtLYbybtsU2F9rnBwwESGW6S1M61GB2t-ERXFgtSWN6qLnKOQgFLWwQkbbJTBDdLwM8Oqi0Aff4F7j7hP70gI3R2hX4Y4CuFjzmqzRld5o9mEFa2uvIY-PNhYFYq-tPEp0HS0DZ54vi6VCop3) lawsuit for creating a “hostile workplace environment” for women.
Spokesman Ryan Reynolds said, “Dean Browning is a failed liberal career politician that just doesn't know when to call it quits. When voters made the mistake of voting him into his only elected office as Lehigh county commissioner, he sided with liberal Democrats raising taxes on Lehigh county taxpayers by over $16 million. He also increased spending by over $10 million. Voters rejected his liberal policies and actually elected Lisa Scheller to replace him in 2011. She quickly became a conservative leader, cutting taxes and saving taxpayers over $40 million. Dean Browning thinks he can fool voters, but his liberal record and countless failures in the ballot box say otherwise.”

The radio ad highlights Dean Browning's series of tax and spend votes on the Lehigh County Commission, where Browning sided with liberal Democrats instead of conservatives and allowed government spending to increase by millions of dollars. This ad comes on the heels of Scheller’s ad promoting her fiscally conservative record of cutting taxes and saving taxpayers over $40 million due to her leadership on the Lehigh County Commission. The ad also describes Browning’s disturbing issue with women in the workplace. In 2018 Dean was lawsuit for creating a “hostile workplace environment” for women. Spokesman Ryan Reynolds said, “Dean Browning is a failed liberal career politician that just doesn't know when to call it quits. When voters made the mistake of voting him into his only elected office as Lehigh county commissioner, he sided with liberal Democrats raising taxes on Lehigh county taxpayers by over $16 million. He also increased spending by over $10 million. Voters rejected his liberal policies and actually elected Lisa Scheller to replace him in 2011. She quickly became a conservative leader, cutting taxes and saving taxpayers over $40 million. Dean Browning thinks he can fool voters, but his liberal record and countless failures in the ballot box say otherwise.” You can listen to the ad . ### Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: My letter to President Trump concerning the family farm in Kansas.
body:
| | | Peter,

This past week after visiting farmers and ranchers all over western Kansas, I wrote a letter to President Trump letting him know the struggles facing our farmers and ranchers in Kansas. Please forward my letter to your friends and family that care about the future of our family farms.
---
| |
---
| Dear Mr. President,

This past week, my campaign team and I had the opportunity to spend time in Western Kansas meeting with farmers and ranchers regarding the state of agriculture. After meeting with many individuals in every aspect of the cattle industry, I felt compelled to bring to your attention the dire situation they are in. The facts are clear - something must be done to dramatically change the way livestock are bought and sold in the market.

First of all, I must say that I applaud your order calling for an investigation of the meat packing industry. The day you called for the investigation by the Department of Justice on May 6, 2020 caused the meat packers to adjust prices from $.93/lb to $1.15/lb floor price. An unprecedented $22 per hundred weight (cwt) change in live cattle price in 7 hours, which equates to an average increase of $330 per head! This provided evidence of what we already knew - that cattle pricing is being manipulated by the packers to the detriment of the producers. The packers panicked at the threat of investigation.

The packers are making exorbitant profits while the independent producers are losing the shirts off their back just trying to make a living. **The meat packers have a monopoly that calls for anti-trust legislation**. Over the last few years, small processing plants have been forced out of business, leaving the processing of cattle to four major companies. If that wasn’t bad enough, **the vast majority of** **these four companies are owned by foreign entities.**

As a businessman who values hard work and the American pioneering spirit, it is imperative for the future of our country and the State of Kansas, that we put America First. It is time we **put an end to foreign controlled monopolies** that are **forcing farmers and ranchers out of businesses and way of life.**

**The food supply chain is critical to our national security.** Mr. President, you have done a fantastic job putting America First by making America energy-independent. Now it’s time for America to become **food independent**. As you have so accurately called for “Made in America” for our medicines and healthcare supplies, we need to stop the influx of foreign cattle. It is **time for America to embrace Mandatory Country of Origin Labeling (COOL).**

Our farmers and ranchers have the ability to supply all the beef needed in our country, with beef to spare for export. The supply of beef in the United States is best managed by our American Farmers and Ranchers.

In addition, I would also strongly urge you to **investigate the Beef Check-off program** , a program that promotes the beef industry. We need to ensure that it is working to the benefit of the producers who are paying the $1.00/head fee when they sell their cattle. It is a travesty that the meat packers enjoy the benefits of this program; however, they are not providing any of the financial support.

The COVID-19 pandemic has underscored that if we continue to depend on foreign entities for any major aspect of our supply chain, our country will continue to be vulnerable to economic devastation. Cheap imported beef (which often comes from countries that do not have stringent safety requirements) hurts our nation’s farmers and ranchers. The **risks of foreign entities having control over our nation’s food chain is dangerous** and needs to be addressed immediately.

Kansas ranchers and farmers are a tough, resilient group of people who work hard to feed our nation. However, if something is not done quickly to address the unfair competition they are facing, many of them will not survive.

Thank you.

Respectfully,

Dave Lindstrom
Candidate for US Senate-KS
(913) 706-7171
David@DMLindstrom.com

name: Sara Gideon
subject: A recent poll showed me beating Senator Collins, so Mitch McConnell and his allies have blanketed Maine with television ads. Can I count on you to make a contribution to help us fight back?
body:
I can't do this alone.

Friends, can I have a minute of your time?
A recent poll showed me beating Senator Collins by _four points_ -- so One Nation, a Republican dark money group aligned with Mitch McConnell, responded by blanketing Maine with television ads.
That's why I'm reaching out to ask for your help, so we have the resources to set the record straight with Maine voters.
**So please, if you can afford it, use the link below to make a donation of any amount:**
**[Act.SaraGideon.com/May](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802b40/4bef7a87/6cc34bc3/287e7073/1707432628/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDA1MTUtMy10MiJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-may-2020?refcode=em200515-3-t2")**
Thanks for your help. With you by my side, I'm confident we will withstand any attacks and flip this Senate seat.
All my best,
_Sara_

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802b40/4bef7a87/6cc34bc3/287e7072/1707432628/VEsE/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. body:
We'll keep this quick: The CARES Act includes $500 billion of discretionary spending for the United States Treasury Department to lend to businesses and states.
This amount of money warrants nonpartisan oversight. _Yet_... President Trump **fired **the Inspector General in charge of overseeing the Treasury's relief efforts and is now trying to appoint someone with deep ties to the White House.
That means there will be a _total lack of transparency_ as to how the $500 billion will be spent.
**The American public has a right to know.[Demand accountability from the Department of the Treasury>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/wjrqtwr9ZKgirJxlUySmbwGCeDeYn2e6XOtWY-Jrjtw=/nOc3QDWaewZs1zwdCCz5gdj0zk-D3l34sD8C_JuY_l8=)**

name: Team Messner
subject: This Week: GraniteGrok Poll Results, more endorsements, and upcoming events.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. [Contact Us](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/0f66546ed5515e03/06e8b0ab88594f7cc3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**Corky Tops GraniteGrok Voter Poll by a Nearly 4-to-1 Margin Over Primary Opponent**
Corky Messner this week won an online voter poll by almost a 4-to-1 margin over his primary opponent. “It’s reassuring that my message and my mission to return New Hampshire’s conservative values to the U.S. Senate is resonating with Granite State voters,” he says.
GraniteGrok.com’s survey asked readers which of four candidates they’d like to see win the U.S. Senate seat this November: Corky Messner, GOP candidates Don Bolduc and Andy Martin, Democrat incumbent Jeanne Shaheen, or “none of the above.”

Corky captured 74.24% of the 788 votes cast. In second place was Bolduc, with 20.81%, followed by Shaheen with 2.28%, and Martin with 1.27%. “None of the above” received 1.4% of the votes cast.

GraniteGrok is a web-based New Hampshire conservative political forum with a growing and active audience. The poll was limited to one vote per IP address and ran for two-and-a-half days.
|
---
**In The News**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/0f66546ed5515e03/9b14f84282fbcb4bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Corky Messner has been endorsed by the National Association for Gun Rights (NAGR). Read story **[here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/0f66546ed5515e03/ff6dfe426b3978d3c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

“I thank the Association and its members for this endorsement,” says Corky. “I have always believed in the right to bear arms, envisioned by our Founders and protected by our Constitution, and the National Association for Gun Rights has been a steadfast ally in the fight against relentless attacks on our Second Amendment freedoms."
"At a time when the Second Amendment is under assault by anti-gun politicians in both parties, it's encouraging to see a candidate make protecting the right to bear arms a centerpiece of his campaign." says NAGR PAC Director Dudley Brown.
|
---
**Lakes Region State Senator French and Others Join Rapidly Growing List of Messner Endorsers**

State Senator Harold French, who represents Laconia and the surrounding Lakes Region towns, has endorsed Corky Messner.

Also endorsing Corky in his bid to unseat incumbent Democrat Jeanne Shaheen are State Representatives Chris True and David Love, and prominent Republicans Cody Belanger, Tina Harley, Nicole Martin, David Scott, Alex Talcott, Ray Tweedie, and Dan Wheeler.
“I am humbled by the support of Senator French and the many others who have recognized that we represent the best chance of defeating Senator Shaheen in November. Their endorsements will help us continue the fight to restore New Hampshire’s conservative values and common sense to the U.S. Senate," says Corky.

Sen. French, a Franklin resident, has represented District 7 since 2016. The well-known auctioneer and real estate broker previously served in the House.

Also supporting the Messner campaign are Rep. Chris True of Sandown, who represents Rockingham-District 4, who like Messner is an Army veteran and is serving his third term, and Rep. David Love of Derry (Rockingham-District 6), who was elected in 2018 and believes in smaller government and lower taxes.

Rounding out the latest list of endorsements are:
* Cody Belanger of Epping, Selectman, former Area Vice Chair of the New Hampshire Republican State Committee and central Rockingham County GOP activist;
* Tina Harley of Seabrook, a member of the New Hampshire Federation of Republican Women and Team Trump supporter;
* Nicole Martin, a Bedford area activist and a New Hampshire Trump delegate;
* David Scott, Strafford County GOP activist;
* Alex Talcott of Durham, financial planning specialist and adjunct instructor in accounting/finance and management at the University of New Hampshire;
* Ray Tweedie of Rye, Rockingham County Register of Probate, former State Senate candidate and Seacoast community activist; and
* Dan Wheeler of Merrimack, a Marine Corps veteran and retired Sergeant with N.H. State Police.

|
---
**Upcoming Events – Check Our Website!**
We continue our Tele-Town Halls and other virtual events, so check our website regularly for information about the campaign and opportunities to ask Corky _your_ questions.

_Coming up this week_

Tele-Town Halls (Dial-In From Home: 603-506-4097)
Belknap County – Tuesday, May 19, 1-2 p.m.
Rockingham County – Thursday, May 21, 6:30-7:30 p.m.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/0f66546ed5515e03/c9a6c7e943bf9ca9c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|

clean_body: Tap or click to read more >> Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. | | Corky Tops GraniteGrok Voter Poll by a Nearly 4-to-1 Margin Over Primary Opponent Corky Messner this week won an online voter poll by almost a 4-to-1 margin over his primary opponent. “It’s reassuring that my message and my mission to return New Hampshire’s conservative values to the U.S. Senate is resonating with Granite State voters,” he says. GraniteGrok.com’s survey asked readers which of four candidates they’d like to see win the U.S. Senate seat this November: Corky Messner, GOP candidates Don Bolduc and Andy Martin, Democrat incumbent Jeanne Shaheen, or “none of the above.” Corky captured 74.24% of the 788 votes cast. In second place was Bolduc, with 20.81%, followed by Shaheen with 2.28%, and Martin with 1.27%. “None of the above” received 1.4% of the votes cast. GraniteGrok is a web-based New Hampshire conservative political forum with a growing and active audience. The poll was limited to one vote per IP address and ran for two-and-a-half days. | In The News Corky Messner has been endorsed by the National Association for Gun Rights (NAGR). Read story . “I thank the Association and its members for this endorsement,” says Corky. “I have always believed in the right to bear arms, envisioned by our Founders and protected by our Constitution, and the National Association for Gun Rights has been a steadfast ally in the fight against relentless attacks on our Second Amendment freedoms." "At a time when the Second Amendment is under assault by anti-gun politicians in both parties, it's encouraging to see a candidate make protecting the right to bear arms a centerpiece of his campaign." says NAGR PAC Director Dudley Brown. | Lakes Region State Senator French and Others Join Rapidly Growing List of Messner Endorsers State Senator Harold French, who represents Laconia and the surrounding Lakes Region towns, has endorsed Corky Messner. Also endorsing Corky in his bid to unseat incumbent Democrat Jeanne Shaheen are State Representatives Chris True and David Love, and prominent Republicans Cody Belanger, Tina Harley, Nicole Martin, David Scott, Alex Talcott, Ray Tweedie, and Dan Wheeler. “I am humbled by the support of Senator French and the many others who have recognized that we represent the best chance of defeating Senator Shaheen in November. Their endorsements will help us continue the fight to restore New Hampshire’s conservative values and common sense to the U.S. Senate," says Corky. Sen. French, a Franklin resident, has represented District 7 since 2016. The well-known auctioneer and real estate broker previously served in the House. Also supporting the Messner campaign are Rep. Chris True of Sandown, who represents Rockingham-District 4, who like Messner is an Army veteran and is serving his third term, and Rep. David Love of Derry (Rockingham-District 6), who was elected in 2018 and believes in smaller government and lower taxes. Rounding out the latest list of endorsements are: Cody Belanger of Epping, Selectman, former Area Vice Chair of the New Hampshire Republican State Committee and central Rockingham County GOP activist; Tina Harley of Seabrook, a member of the New Hampshire Federation of Republican Women and Team Trump supporter; Nicole Martin, a Bedford area activist and a New Hampshire Trump delegate; David Scott, Strafford County GOP activist; Alex Talcott of Durham, financial planning specialist and adjunct instructor in accounting/finance and management at the University of New Hampshire; Ray Tweedie of Rye, Rockingham County Register of Probate, former State Senate candidate and Seacoast community activist; and Dan Wheeler of Merrimack, a Marine Corps veteran and retired Sergeant with N.H. State Police. | Upcoming Events – Check Our Website! We continue our Tele-Town Halls and other virtual events, so check our website regularly for information about the campaign and opportunities to ask Corky your questions. Coming up this week Tele-Town Halls (Dial-In From Home: 603-506-4097) Belknap County – Tuesday, May 19, 1-2 p.m. Rockingham County – Thursday, May 21, 6:30-7:30 p.m. | IMPORTANT CORONAVIRUS SUPPORT INFO HEALTH INFORMATION New Hampshire Department of Health & Human Services Fact Sheet – . New Hampshire Division of Public Health Services – . For general assistance, a 211 site to locate resources – . Centers for Disease Control: What to do if you are sick with coronavirus disease – . RESOURCES FOR BUSINESSES/EMPLOYMENT NH Department of Employment Security Due to COVID-19, all claims and questions should be directed to or call the Unemployment Assistance Hotline at 603-271-7700.
