name: Jay Inslee
subject: Add your name: Take on Trump's environmental rollbacks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
They're hoping you aren't paying attention.
| **From the Desk of
Jay Inslee** Friend, While the country fights COVID-19, the Trump administration is hard at work -- but not fighting the pandemic. They're putting the final touches on rollbacks for nearly **[100 environmental rules](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8585?t=3&akid=8056%2E868730%2EGmvgse)** , from limits on power plants to rules governing clean air, water, and toxic chemicals. That's right: While we're fighting a disease that attacks our respiratory systems, the Trump administration is prioritizing letting Big Oil and Big Coal worsen our air quality. It's fossil fuel profits and politics over people. Every single time. **The Trump administration is hoping that we missed their attacks on our environment -- but we have to let them know we're watching, and we won't let them get away with this.[Add your name next to mine to tell Donald Trump to put people over politics and fossil fuel profits and stop rolling back environmental rules during a pandemic.](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/environment_rollbacks/?utm_source=ema_2020-05-14_environrollbacks&source=ema_2020-05-14_environrollbacks&utm_campaign=environrollbacks&utm_medium=ema&t=4&akid=8056%2E868730%2EGmvgse)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/environment_rollbacks/?utm_source=ema_2020-05-14_environrollbacks&source=ema_2020-05-14_environrollbacks&utm_campaign=environrollbacks&utm_medium=ema&t=5&akid=8056%2E868730%2EGmvgse)
---
Why is the Trump administration rushing to finish up these rollbacks during a global pandemic -- when anyone would argue their attention should probably be elsewhere?
Because the Trump administration needs to finish these rollbacks in case Democrats take back the Congress and the White House in November -- otherwise, Democrats can reverse the changes. Even during a time of national crisis, the Trump administration only has politics on their mind.
**[_The New York Times_](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8585?t=6&akid=8056%2E868730%2EGmvgse)** found that not only will these rollbacks significantly increase greenhouse gas emissions but could also lead to thousands of extra deaths from poor air quality each year. All this, during a pandemic that attacks our respiratory system -- it's unconscionable and deeply personal to me and I imagine to so many of you, too.
[**Donald Trump is hoping we're too distracted to speak out -- join me in speaking out against these dangerous environmental rollbacks by adding your name right now.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/environment_rollbacks/?utm_source=ema_2020-05-14_environrollbacks&source=ema_2020-05-14_environrollbacks&utm_campaign=environrollbacks&utm_medium=ema&t=7&akid=8056%2E868730%2EGmvgse)
Very truly yours,
Jay
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/environment_rollbacks/?utm_source=ema_2020-05-14_environrollbacks&source=ema_2020-05-14_environrollbacks&utm_campaign=environrollbacks&utm_medium=ema&t=8&akid=8056%2E868730%2EGmvgse)
---

PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Imagine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
More than a million people have moved to Texas in the last three years,
and I’m trying to get in touch with them.

The good news about this group is that it’s comprised of folks who have
reliably voted in the Democratic primary in their previous states.

The bad news is that they have failed to update their voter registration.
In other words, they’re still registered to vote in Illinois or California
or New York. If they just updated their registration, they could vote in
the next election in Texas.

Imagine if we were able to register just 50% of them ahead of November. It
would mean we’d likely WIN the State House and help deliver the 38
electoral college votes to the Democratic nominee for President, denying
Donald Trump a second term.*

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42505?source=ema20200515-89612&t=1001&akid=89612%2E444211%2EwxPWN0 ]Can you join me Tuesday, May 26th to call unregistered Democratic
voters in Texas? Help us win the State House and stop Trump by signing up
for the phone bank right now.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42505?source=ema20200515-89612&t=1002&akid=89612%2E444211%2EwxPWN0 ]Sign up

(*Historical perspective: in the midterm elections of 2018, despite
significant voter suppression and a cycle that typically favors Republican
turnout over Democratic turnout, in Texas we won two new seats in the U.S.
Congress, twelve seats in the State House, and I came within 2.6% of
defeating Ted Cruz.)

With 500,000 new Democratic voters in a Presidential election cycle, there
is no stopping us.

So how do we get these proven Democratic voters registered and to the
polls so that they can save Texas and our country?

That’s where you and I and hopefully a lot of other people come in.

I’ve organized a series of national phone banks with thousands of
volunteers to call these reliable-but-unregistered Democratic voters who
will have just received a voter registration application in the mail. Our
phone calls just make sure that these voters have signed the form and
mailed it in. That’s it.

Something like this:

- Hi, is this John Doe?

- Yes, who is this?

- Hi John, my name is Beto and I’m calling to make sure you’ve signed and
mailed back the voter registration form we mailed to your house.

- That must be the letter sitting on my kitchen counter. Alright, I’ll
fill it out and send it in!

- Thanks!

Pretty easy, right?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42505?source=ema20200515-89612&t=1003&akid=89612%2E444211%2EwxPWN0 ]Would you be up for spending a couple of hours with me Tuesday, May
26th making calls to unregistered Democratic voters in Texas? No pressure,
but if you say yes you might very well make the difference in the most
important election in our lifetime.

Looking forward to doing this with you,

Beto

Upcoming events:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42505?source=ema20200515-89612&t=1004&akid=89612%2E444211%2EwxPWN0 ]Virtual Voter Registration Phone Bank
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42505?source=ema20200515-89612&t=1005&akid=89612%2E444211%2EwxPWN0 ]Tuesday, May 26th, 6:30pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42505?source=ema20200515-89612&t=1006&akid=89612%2E444211%2EwxPWN0 ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42506?source=ema20200515-89612&t=1007&akid=89612%2E444211%2EwxPWN0 ]Virtual Voter Registration Phone Bank
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42506?source=ema20200515-89612&t=1008&akid=89612%2E444211%2EwxPWN0 ]Thursday, May 28th, 6:30pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42506?source=ema20200515-89612&t=1009&akid=89612%2E444211%2EwxPWN0 ]Get more info or RSVP »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1010&akid=89612%2E444211%2EwxPWN0

name: Michelle De La Isla
subject: Thank you Mayor Pete
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
_Mayor De La Isla's number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends --

My first day at the New Mayor's School was like any other first day of school -- I was nervous about meeting new people and finding common ground with them. My first session that day was with Mayor Pete Buttigieg, and as you can imagine, I knew that this was a new friend. Not just because he is also a midwestern mayor whose constituents were facing many of the same challenges as mine were, but also because of the sincerity and poise he exhibited.

Mayor Pete's bold approach was inspiring -- his 1,000 homes in 1,000 days project alone was an incredible accomplishment! Pete always demonstrated what intellect married with compassion can do, which is why I was excited to endorse him for President. It's also why I am so honored to have his endorsement in my race for Kansas' 2nd District.

**[Will you stand with Pete and Win The Era by chipping in to help send me to Congress to fight for Kansans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17513281/196722790/-1952513085?gpsid=22_122_12974&refcode=em20_200515_pete2_fnd_gq_act__MDLI_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200515_pete2_fnd_gq_act__MDLI_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjhjZDhiNy0wYTk3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lIWYbTM1xLHpuBuvrfcrbAnHq0SZ1vbsPtC5oC8jfQc=)**

Being endorsed by Pete is humbling. The fact that he believes so much in us, to put his name behind this race is inspirational. The Win the Era PAC is supporting individuals who are running for office with values conducive to restoring our democracy and giving EVERYONE an equal voice.

I'm running to be a different kind of leader for our state. I understand the problems Kansans face, because I've faced them too. From being a young mother to experiencing homelessness to navigating the healthcare system -- the challenges I've faced have taught me to lead with compassion and determination.

But I can't do this alone. I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to step up and ensure this campaign has the resources it takes to send me to Congress to fight for you.

**[Can I count on your support? Donate $10 or more to stand with Win The Era, and help send me to Congress>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17513282/196722791/-1952513085?gpsid=22_122_12974&refcode=em20_200515_pete2_fnd_gq_act__MDLI_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200515_pete2_fnd_gq_act__MDLI_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjhjZDhiNy0wYTk3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lIWYbTM1xLHpuBuvrfcrbAnHq0SZ1vbsPtC5oC8jfQc=)**

Thank you,

Michelle

**Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can.**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17513283/196722792/-1952513085?gpsid=22_122_12974&refcode=em20_200515_pete2_fnd_gq_act__MDLI_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200515_pete2_fnd_gq_act__MDLI_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjhjZDhiNy0wYTk3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lIWYbTM1xLHpuBuvrfcrbAnHq0SZ1vbsPtC5oC8jfQc=)

name: GOP ALERTS
subject: Blackburn Sends "Warning Shot" to Beijing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marsha for Senate
body:
Since joining the Senate as Tennessee's newest Senator, Marsha Blackburn has had a long history of taking on the Communist Party of China. Here's a quick timeline:

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, click [here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MTA2MDQS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQ3ODM3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
__

Since joining the Senate as Tennessee's newest Senator, Marsha Blackburn has been taking on the Communist Party of China. Here's a quick timeline:

**APRIL 2019: **Raised concerns about Chinese forced labor in the U.S. supply chain

**JUNE 2019:** Called China and North Korea out on human rights violations

**NOVEMBER 2019:** Cracked down on privacy concerns related to the Chinese-owned app TikTok

**NOVEMBER 2019:** Stood with the Hong Kong freedom fighters against China's violent response to their protests

**MARCH 2020:** Warned allies about 5G technology surveillance concerns stemming from Chinese company, Huawei

**APRIL 2020:** Fought to hold China legally and financially accountable for the COVID-19 crisis

And, in her most recent initiative in light of renewed concerns regarding misinformation and security, Marsha Blackburn is leading the charge again, sending a warning to Beijing by restricting their access to Capitol Hill and calling on other leaders to join her fight.

Axios reports:

_" Blackburn told colleagues that denying access to Senate offices sends a 'warning shot' to Beijing in the misinformation war over the origins of the coronavirus.

Banning meetings with Huawei, TikTok, telecom company ZTE, and drone-maker DJI 'is a long overdue sanction,' she wrote, pointing to bans on government agencies using Huawei and ZTE equipment, and rules against some federal employees using TikTok on government devices."_

**
Read more about how Marsha is confronting China[HERE](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MTA2MDQS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQ3ODM3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0).**

********
Paid for by Marsha for Senate
---
********

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Marsha for Senate. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Marsha for Senate's online community.

[Privacy Policy](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MTA2MDQS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQ3ODM3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)********

| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17513419/196731369/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWRjOWFjYS0wZDk3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JcwJIPNbvVoFPhIlT1hpp9x2SInvJvmT3EgYjAaTCKU=&emci=32f13c19-dc96-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=d5dc9aca-0d97-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *
Hi Friend,

It’s Friday night so I’ll keep this short:

We always knew the key to winning in November would be through turnout, friend. It’s clear on the ground that Texas families are tired of the same old, same old, failed leadership -- and are ready for change.

I’m running to bring true leadership to our community, **which is why I’m not accepting a cent of corporate PAC money and have focused my campaign on fighting the DC special interests that work against Houstonians.**

If you’re with me and this grassroots movement we’ve built, please consider donating to our campaign tonight: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17513420/196731370/1700156400?refcode=em_fr_2020.05.15_SPK_b2_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWRjOWFjYS0wZDk3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JcwJIPNbvVoFPhIlT1hpp9x2SInvJvmT3EgYjAaTCKU=)

Thank you,
Sri

clean_body: It’s Friday night so I’ll keep this short. We always knew the key to winning in November would be through turnout... = | Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. Please visit our to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. Hi Friend, It’s Friday night so I’ll keep this short: We always knew the key to winning in November would be through turnout, friend. It’s clear on the ground that Texas families are tired of the same old, same old, failed leadership -- and are ready for change. I’m running to bring true leadership to our community, which is why I’m not accepting a cent of corporate PAC money and have focused my campaign on fighting the DC special interests that work against Houstonians. If you’re with me and this grassroots movement we’ve built, please consider donating to our campaign tonight: = Thank you, Sri | = Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | = Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at | Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

On Tuesday, Outvote partner [Community Change Action](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=0f06a513f7&e=0aad15100c) hosted a webinar with Stacey Abrams on Building a Caring Economy. We were particularly inspired by this quote from Abrams: "The most important language is the language of community."

If you missed the live event, don't worry: a video of the full webinar can be found [here](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=5285ae5364&e=0aad15100c).

******\- Stacey Abrams**

name: CO-Senate ALERT
subject: Cory Gardner launches first ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| DEVELOPING: Republican Cory Gardner is up with his first TV ad of 2020.

[Chip in to make sure John Hickenlooper can fight back](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4960/4bd7760e/5c710ef1/77aec55c/168261423/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_may_hick?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Chip+in+to+make+sure+John+Hickenlooper+c&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200516_1MC-1MO_none_STD_1_bollier&source=314_EM_FR_200516_1MC-1MO_none_STD_1_bollier&refcode=314_EM_FR_200516_1MC-1MO_none_STD_1_hicksplit")
* * *
Listen --

We knew Gardner was in trouble -- he's made it clear that he's Trump's fixer, not Colorado's senator.

Gardner knows that John Hickenlooper is leading in the polls.

**The only way he can win is by flooding the air with dishonest ads that whitewash his record while drowning out Hick 's message.**

_Gardner is one of the MOST endangered Senators but has a massive cash on hand advantage. Which is why Hick needs our help ASAP to fight back and avoid getting drowned out thanks to Gardner 's cash on hand advantage._

[Can you make a donation of $10 to help Hick fight back?](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4960/4bd7760e/5c710ef1/77aec55b/168261423/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_may_hick?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+make+a+donation+of+ask+to+help+H&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200516_1MC-1MO_none_STD_1_bollier&source=314_EM_FR_200516_1MC-1MO_none_STD_1_bollier&refcode=314_EM_FR_200516_1MC-1MO_none_STD_1_hicksplit")

We're excited to let you know that Sen. Warner's Northern Virginia-focused virtual town hall has been rescheduled for next Monday. Event details are below. Although this event is focused on Northern Virginia, all are welcome, and we hope to see you there! | **Facebook Live Town Hall with Senator Mark Warner**
Monday, May 18, 2020
5:45 PM ET
**[Click here to RSVP](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d480/53d9897e/54e55571/1c88758d/3228463224/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.mobilize.us/vavictory/event/273790/")**

This event is hosted on Facebook, **but you do not need a Facebook account to access the town hall.** If you already have a question for Mark, please respond directly to this email -- he'll answer as many as possible during the broadcast. You can also ask questions during the broadcast using the comment feature. Mark is looking forward to updating everyone on what he's been working on and making sure his constituents have the resources and information they need.

We hope you'll join us on Monday! **[Click here to sign up.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d480/53d9897e/54e55571/1c88758d/3228463224/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.mobilize.us/vavictory/event/273790/")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Convention comes to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
By now, I'm sure you've probably heard the news: Unfortunately, we won't be able to hold an in-person convention this year. COVID-19's distributions..

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/best-lt-governor-in-the-country-469257?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://vimeo.com/417726600?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Convention Comes to You

By now, I'm sure you've probably heard the news: Unfortunately, we won't be able to hold an in-person convention this year. COVID-19's disruptions to life have been widespread, and our party, elections and campaigns have certainly not been immune.

The change to convention is disappointing, but just like the changes we're seeing now to campaigns (I discussed some of them this week in an interview with Howey Politics Indiana (https://howeypolitics.com/Content/Default/Lead-Story/Article/HPI-Interview-Chairman-Hupfer-at-the-nexus-of-pandemic-era-politics/-3/346/23731?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) ), we're adapting -- and we're working to open the doors to our convention wider than they've ever been. We're bringing convention directly to you and to every Hoosier.

On June 18, Hoosiers across the state will be able to tune in to watch our convention, as WISH-TV and its statewide partners broadcast it live. They'll hear from the attorney general candidates, Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch and Governor Eric Holcomb. We'll also be livestreaming the whole thing, and then posting it online for all to watch.

And then when it's time to vote, we've worked hard to replicate the convention voting process as much as possible through mail-in ballots that will come to you from a third-party vendor, and will be returned to a third-party accounting firm.

I'd encourage you to read the full letter I sent out earlier this week here (http://indiana.gop/stateconvention?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) -- but know this. Through this all, our goal has been to ensure delegates will be the ones voting for our nominees for attorney general and lieutenant governor.

This year, we can't go to convention, so we're bringing convention to you.

- Chairman Kyle Hupfer
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Phase Two, More Testing & Scientific Study

This week, Governor Holcomb continued to lead Indiana through Phase Two of Indiana’s Back on Track plan (https://backontrack.in.gov/?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) . In most of the state, we’re seeing restaurants and retail stores re-opening at 50% capacity, and personal services like haircuts resuming by appointment.

Along the way, Governor Holcomb has said this reopening will be data-driven, and so today he gave us an update on where we stand with the data:
1. Hospitalizations – The number of Hoosiers hospitalized with COVID-19 has dropped from 170 on April 1 to 71 on May 12.
2. Surge Capacity – As of just yesterday, 40% of Indiana’s ICU beds are available, and ventilator availability is remaining steady at 80%
3. Testing – More than 170 testing sites are available throughout Indiana, including 50 free testing sites administered by the Indiana State Department of Health. Find a site hear you here (https://www.coronavirus.in.gov/2524.htm?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .
4. Contact Tracing – More than 500 Hoosiers are currently working as contact tracers – doctors, nurses, epidemiologists, medical students and more. They’re working daily tracking and limiting the spread of this virus. And remember, your information always remains private.

Also this week, Governor Holcomb announced the preliminary results of the first round of a scientific study looking at the spread of COVID-19 in Indiana:
* This study was conducted by the Indiana University Fairbanks School of Public Health with random testing in late April.
* The study showed that 2.8%, or 186,000, of all Hoosiers have had COVID-19. And it showed that 0.58% of infected people have died, making COVID-19 six times more deadly than the seasonal flu.
* The study also showed that 44.8% of people who tested positive showed no symptoms that they were infected – making it even more important that we all follow safety guidelines to limit the spread of the virus.
* Read more findings from the extensive study here (https://calendar.in.gov/site/isdh/event/iu-isdh-release-preliminary-findings-about-covid-19-impact-on-indiana/?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , which will be conducted again in June.

To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , Twitter (https://twitter.com/holcombforin?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) and Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/holcombforin/?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

Thank you to every Hoosier who is doing his or her part to stop the spread of the coronavirus and flatten the curve. We're #INThisTogether, and we're getting #BackOnTrack!

2020 Indiana Republican Convention Goes Virtual

In case you missed it, earlier this week we announced that unfortunately due to restrictions because of COVID-19, we will not be able to hold the 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention in person.

The Indiana Republican State Committee unanimously approved temporary rules (http://indiana.gop/sites/default/files/Temporary%20Rules.pdf?mc_cid=1559200ee1&mc_eid=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) that will allow us to hold a virtual contention and mail-in voting, recreating many aspects of our in-person conventions and ensuring all delegates will be able to vote.

A few important dates:
June 2 – Indiana Primary (delegates will be elected)
June 22 – Approximate date that delegates will receive ballots from a third-party vendor
July 9 – Deadline for a delegate’s ballot to be received by the third-party accounting firm
July 10 – Ballots will be counted with watchers present, and winners will be announced

More updates will continue to be provided. For more information, read Chairman Hupfer’s full letter here (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/2020-indiana-republican-convention-update?e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) or watch his video here (https://vimeo.com/417726600?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .
https://howeypolitics.com/Content/Default/Lead-Story/Article/HPI-Interview-Chairman-Hupfer-at-the-nexus-of-pandemic-era-politics/-3/346/23731?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Chairman Hupfer Talks Politics in Time of COVID-19

Chairman Hupfer did an interview this week with Howey Politics Indiana, discussing changes to the 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention and modifications all campaigns are making during this time – including a lot more Zoom meetings.

Read the full interview here (https://howeypolitics.com/Content/Default/Lead-Story/Article/HPI-Interview-Chairman-Hupfer-at-the-nexus-of-pandemic-era-politics/-3/346/23731?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .
https://action.indiana.gop/get-election-updates-040120/?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Primary Election Resources

It’s almost time for the polls to open for the 2020 Indiana primary – with many Hoosiers having already cast their vote via an absentee ballot. A few reminders and dates to watch:
* Next Thursday – May 21 – is the last day for your county clerk or Board of Elections to receive your request for an absentee ballot. If you’re planning to vote absentee, make sure to get your request in now.
* We’ve got instructions and a link to request your ballot online here (https://action.indiana.gop/get-election-updates-040120/?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , if you'd like to vote absentee in the primary.
* Early in-person voting begins on Thursday, May 26.
* Primary Day is Tuesday, June 2 – polls will be open from 6 a.m. to 6 p.m. for in-person voting, and you’ll have until noon to return an absentee ballot

For a list of more upcoming election deadlines and for instructions on how to request an absentee ballot, visit your new Indiana Republican Resource Page here (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8d5f0e8b64&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

--> Click here to view the Indiana Republican Election Resource Page <-- (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=09c08f3895&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

News You Can Use

Governor Eric Holcomb announces results of new COVID-19 scientific study (https://indianapublicmedia.org/news/study-suggests-186,000-hoosiers-with-covid-19-nearly-half-without-symptoms.php?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch congratulated the 2020 STEM team recipients (https://twitter.com/LGSuzanneCrouch/status/1260244635504517122?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Senator Todd Young proposes the RESTART Act for small businesses (https://www.wlfi.com/content/news/Senator-Todd-Young-proposes-the-RESTART-Act-for-small-businesses-570450581.html?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Senator Mike Braun on COVID-19 concerns in Indiana (https://www.npr.org/2020/05/13/855121276/sen-braun-on-covid-19-concerns-and-whether-indiana-reopen-too-soon?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congresswoman Jackie Walorski says Hoosiers stepped up in time of great need (https://www.kokomotribune.com/opinion/columns/jackie-walorski-hoosiers-step-up-in-time-of-great-need/article_9b722a98-95df-11ea-a519-7b8f72180bfe.html?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Congressman Jim Baird continues to work from home (http://www.newsbug.info/kankakee_valley_post_news/news/national/congressman-continues-work-from-home/article_40196590-de23-5492-96ec-3f06ce78def6.html?mc_cid=2e32aa3567&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
No, ObamaGate is Not a ‘Conspiracy Theory’ | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=646ddcd340&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**No, ObamaGate is Not a ‘Conspiracy Theory’**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ebc9f52185&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“Mounting evidence suggests the Obama administration engaged in serious corruption with ObamaGate,” David Harsanyi writes. “The investigation into President Trump was predicated on an opposition-research document filled with fabulism and, most likely, Russian disinformation. We know the Department of Justice withheld contradictory evidence when it began spying on those in Trump’s orbit.”

**🎬** **Obamagate: **[A historic act of political corruption](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1c5b6cb99a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump Names Team to Develop Coronavirus Vaccine at ‘Warp Speed’**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b34e56c2b0&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.politico.com/news/2020/05/15/trump-coronavirus-vaccine-development-team-260678")
_-Politico_
In a Rose Garden address today, “President Donald Trump formally announced the former head of vaccines at GlaxoSmithKline and a general in charge of Army readiness will lead the government’s effort to speed the development of potential coronavirus vaccines,” David Lim and Zachary Brennan report.

**🎬** **MORE:** [Coronavirus vaccine is coming soon thanks to Operation Warp Speed](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ccf16eedc7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**'With Your Help, We’re Going to Vanquish the Virus’: President Trump Praises Pennsylvania Workers**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=90fcb86f93&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Morning Call_
President Trump on Thursday “toured a medical supply distribution center that ships masks and other protective equipment across the country,” Laura Olson and Michelle Merlin report. Before an audience of cheering workers at Owens & Minor Inc. in Upper Macungie, the President also pressed Pennsylvania to loosen overbearing restrictions.

**🇺🇸** **President Trump in Pennsylvania:** [“We'll get our nation back to work”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f882b0e296&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Nancy Pelosi’s $3 Trillion Coronavirus ‘Relief’ Bill is Purely a Political Stunt**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5642118a23&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“House Speaker Nancy Pelosi is happy to play rank politics with the federal coronavirus response,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes. Exhibit A is the absurd $3 trillion package she unveiled, which is the first major emergency bill written by one party with zero input from the other. “The bill is packed with junk that has nothing to do with the pandemic.”
---
|
---
| [**Trump Unveils Official Space Force Flag**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=16f6784609&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Hill_
“The Trump administration on Friday unveiled the official flag to be used by the Space Force, the newest branch of the military,” Brett Samuels reports. “The flag is dark blue with a delta wing, an elliptical orbit and three large stars . . . It is the first new military flag to be unveiled in 72 years.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6d12655f1b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3e945baad2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=7536306223)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Georgette =?iso-8859-1?b?R/NtZXo=?=
subject: Servant leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
|
Glad I caught you, friend.

I wanted to give you a quick update on our campaign’s fundraising efforts before the books close on our mid-quarter fundraising push. Right now, we’re only **$1,026** away from our goal -- which means we only need **38** more supporters to step up with a donation before midnight.

**[Can you chip in $3 to put us over the top?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17513622/196750339/1147193815?refcode=em-200515-all-2-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWFiNDA1ZC0xYTk3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kV1l6jcR5GXzRfmg0AXjYsbTsv6XuvCNszdqIpZndYw=)**

I say this a lot, but I truly can’t thank you enough for your support.

A lot has changed over the last few weeks. Rather than our normal door-to-door canvassing and phone banking, we've taken this campaign online, and have spent more time checking in on our elderly neighbors than doing traditional voter outreach.

This team is meeting the moment, and I’m hopeful that the kind of servant leadership I’ve seen from each one of you won’t end once we emerge from this crisis.

I'm more committed than ever to this fight for working families, and if your commitment over the last couple months is any indication, I know that you’ll have my back through thick and thin.

**[Before the clock strikes midnight, please make a donation to help us hit this mid-quarter goal and enter the next phase of our campaign with strength.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17513623/196750340/1147193815?refcode=em-200515-all-2-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWFiNDA1ZC0xYTk3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kV1l6jcR5GXzRfmg0AXjYsbTsv6XuvCNszdqIpZndYw=)**

Thank you — from the bottom of my heart.

_Georgette Gómez_

---
Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
---
Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community. _**Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party.**_ Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. To support Georgette's campaign please [make a donation here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17513624/196750341/1136511447?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWFiNDA1ZC0xYTk3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kV1l6jcR5GXzRfmg0AXjYsbTsv6XuvCNszdqIpZndYw=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/58ae1073-f496-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd/daab405d-1a97-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWFiNDA1ZC0xYTk3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kV1l6jcR5GXzRfmg0AXjYsbTsv6XuvCNszdqIpZndYw=&id=110960909&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

body:
---
| | **[TOP TRUMP DONOR APPOINTED TO LEAD POST OFFICE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d771/3032832156/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200515_em_pet_b1_uav_ia")** [SIGN THE PETITION: We CANNOT allow Trump and his new postmaster general to dismantle the post office -- and SABOTAGE our ability to safely vote by mail. Ben Ray needs 50,000 signatures on his emergency petition to RESCUE the post office and DENOUNCE Trump's unbelievable appointment >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d771/3032832156/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200515_em_pet_b1_uav_ia") | Wow. One of Trump's TOP Republican donors was just appointed to lead the post office.

His hand-picked crony will oversee one of the BIGGEST vote-by-mail elections in our history -- **[this ploy should disturb every single one of us.](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d771/3032832156/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200515_em_pet_b1_uav_ia")**

[**_50,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Ben Ray just launched an emergency petition to SAVE the post office and STOP Trump 's new postmaster general from sabotaging Americans' ability to vote by mail. He needs 50,000 signatures before midnight. Will you sign immediately? >>_**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d771/3032832156/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200515_em_pet_b1_uav_ia")
** ** [****NAME** : dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d771/3032832156/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200515_em_pet_b1_uav_ia")
SIGNER #252485 ** ** | **[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d771/3032832156/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200515_em_pet_b1_uav_ia")**
---
We need to move NOW.

**[FIRST:](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d771/3032832156/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200515_em_pet_b1_uav_ia")** Trump learned this could be the BIGGEST vote-by-mail election in our country's history.

**[THEN:](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d771/3032832156/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200515_em_pet_b1_uav_ia")** He REJECTED emergency post office funds to keep it open during this crisis.

**[NOW:](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d771/3032832156/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200515_em_pet_b1_uav_ia")** One of Trump's TOP DONORS was just named postmaster general -- he'll oversee MILLIONS of Americans' vote-by-mail ballots.

One thing has never been more clear:

**[Trump is terrified he'll lose this election -- so he's trying to stop Americans from voting by mail and voting him OUT of office.](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d771/3032832156/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200515_em_pet_b1_uav_ia")**
**_[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: We must NOT let Trump corrupt our post office and sabotage this election from the inside. Ben Ray needs 50,000 signatures on his emergency petition to RESCUE the post office and STOP Trump's disgusting ploy. Will you sign immediately? >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d771/3032832156/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200515_em_pet_b1_uav_ia")_**
Thank you,

Team Ben Ray

---
[](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d776/3032832156/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d777/3032832156/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d774/3032832156/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d775/3032832156/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d76a/3032832156/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d76b/3032832156/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d777/3032832156/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click the button below to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. **[UNSUBSCRIBE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b16f/18e32a7f/4c241e28/7b21d768/3032832156/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe")**

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Joe Kennedy III Campaign HQ
subject: We can't let these attacks on Joe go unanswered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
we need your help to fight back |
---
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-markeyrr?refcode=E2777-20200515-markeyrr_zombie-graphic&amount=10&amounts=10,20,70,130,180")
---
The Markey campaign is spreading misinformation online about Joe. They are responding to Joe's fact-based critique of the Senator's record with false and negative attacks.
[**We need your help to fight back with a positive message and set the record straight, will you chip in $10 or $20 to raise $5,850.00 into our Online Rapid Response Fund before midnight tonight?**](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-markeyrr?refcode=E2777-20200515-markeyrr_zombie-SL&amount=10&amounts=10,20,70,130,180")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| **[$10](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-markeyrr?refcode=E2777-20200515-markeyrr_zombie-EG&express_lane=true&amount=10&amounts=10,20,70,130,180")**

| **[$20](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-markeyrr?refcode=E2777-20200515-markeyrr_zombie-EG&express_lane=true&amount=20&amounts=10,20,70,130,180")**

| **[$70](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-markeyrr?refcode=E2777-20200515-markeyrr_zombie-EG&express_lane=true&amount=70&amounts=10,20,70,130,180")**

| **[$130](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-markeyrr?refcode=E2777-20200515-markeyrr_zombie-EG&express_lane=true&amount=130&amounts=10,20,70,130,180")**
---
| **[$180](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-markeyrr?refcode=E2777-20200515-markeyrr_zombie-EG&express_lane=true&amount=180&amounts=10,20,70,130,180")**
---
| **[Other](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-markeyrr?refcode=E2777-20200515-markeyrr_zombie-EG&amount=10&amounts=10,20,70,130,180")**
---
* * *
Senator Markey's attacks on Joe of "politicizing a crisis" and "playing politics with the coronavirus to try and further his career" are disingenuous, disheartening -- and wrong.
Two months ago today, when a state of emergency was declared in Massachusetts, Joe suspended campaign operations to focus exclusively on this crisis. _Senator Markey did not. _
We turned our email fundraising list into a charity drive, raising nearly $100,000 for those suffering and those fighting on the frontlines. We leveraged our social media channels and website to provide important information about COVID-19 and held daily live streams to keep everyone connected and informed. Our organizing team has been doing phone banks across the state to check in on vulnerable residents and help seniors in need.
Joe drove back and forth to D.C. twice to ensure he represented his district's voice as the House fought to provide coronavirus relief. And Joe showed up virtually and in-person in Chelsea and Brockton to help the communities hit the hardest -- long before the T.V. cameras arrived.
_Senator Markey is running on his record. After 47 years in office, it 's fair to critique votes he has taken and choices he has made that weren't good for Massachusetts, from the Iraq War to NAFTA. If that's all it takes for the Markey team to put out false attacks on Joe -- then we are worried they are going to be even more negative moving forward -- and that is not the kind of campaign Massachusetts wants. _
[**If you can help us respond with a positive message before midnight tonight, please chip in $10 or $20 here to show the Markey campaign that we won 't let these false attacks on Joe go unanswered to Massachusetts voters. **](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-markeyrr?refcode=E2777-20200515-markeyrr_zombie-SL&amount=10&amounts=10,20,70,130,180")
Be well. Stay safe. Let's keep fighting.
\-- Joe Kennedy III Campaign Team
|
---

If you'd still like to unsubscribe, you can do so by [clicking here.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390603/55b66746/20389bb4/80ebbaa/2398120807/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
PO Box 15,
Boston, MA 02137

I’m hoping to keep the positive momentum going as long as possible - but right now - we’re coming up short on our mid-month goals for May. FUNDRAISING DEADLINE: MAY 20TH GOAL: 500 DONORS DONOR STATUS FOR EMAIL: **Pending...** [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=bc4c1d2731fa43d6886275119c8d6562&_e=ZtG3yOYELyJwOrqEHF9cFRfTuyFvZeMOU5BJzC8CDKp5Xe6wzHXjky3JnKDLaNCBKNwSlTlxAOcsyyMGqrP4H17D5TUHU1_IggTWA59DAMarChbTfmZS1xRkmC1kEuezxHalFqBf5ccKmWJTPWppLmFu0Pmd4KxD0VDja8E1bfujWjOa-NvJwXACLAdKfSxWfRV3KYMpJRKasxyt_VHBbZ634XOFGK1xoOLqk95dYnS05fmxKi8l0HQMR8IGF_tfJaU3QQHJVAwed4nnLbqPhfHponXUUnaNPi7H8yfCrFPlZ-12MX6XQJeOa6IZbnuTHxKGTxTg9TwQP5Os74_YIenHrbThw400P_Xus_HDXAk3FMmOOXHxJ3YeLW2azA0kRTJVwjFqPO-kVErXNRP4_4MeDNx0QnBh90DOlSqKang%3D) Friend, there are a lot of big things happening in Washington, and I’m proud to continue voting IN PERSON to defend Hoosier values. While nothing is perfect right now, there are a lot of things moving in the right direction to make sure our families, our businesses, and our veterans are taken care of in this ongoing crisis. I’m hoping to keep the positive momentum going as long as possible - but right now - we’re coming up short on our mid-month goals for May. Can you help me out? __**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution**__ [**ONE CLICK DONATION: $5 >>**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=bc4c1d2731fa43d6886275119c8d6562&_e=ZtG3yOYELyJwOrqEHF9cFRfTuyFvZeMOU5BJzC8CDKp5Xe6wzHXjky3JnKDLaNCBxrdVmjwimFJ4yna0TXfBr0Z7fFy4Dgle7qR5WUzmeqRX3XGjSx_4ZBEOblkhQEclV58TnYChez_BqpB357w3Oexe-12RFioieIyz0AFu6VdhI9je-4UEFWvXzplRshxM-Yruw6ISzOaUFDu-Pv6cR_9_FXCFJtLxePY1sHYMj4r2AuSEkLcH3ayISVlmFpnpvRobvm0CoR-TUIU4Zt75KdPmRV-LyOsYrLuyYeZup1bTkFeziv1fJcqchmAsHWpuGQSoSMv3hQAO_fuU2SOcwptfJSMoKdQlbEu0dgmOKVFtW1DJaNNM7rJ-hyds3aQ2CAzEtT-B_tiTeFRAB9wyAVTQkP4APVXlgD1m6TyNgFNSFRWAGlWhpnSm-p4md-YJ) __**If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**__ Friend, I know these times are tough.
And it’s completely changed the way we do things. Our campaign is having to work twice as hard to make sure we can reach out to the Hoosiers who need to hear from us.
And it’s WORTH IT.
But it takes time and it takes resources.
That’s why we have to hit these important fundraising goals. If we’re successful, we are better equipped to keep in touch, share our message, and help keep Congress focused on the things that matter to every Hoosier.
**Right now, we’re just 500 donors short of our goals. Can you help close the gap by chipping in now?** __**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution**__ [**ONE CLICK DONATION: $5 >>**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=bc4c1d2731fa43d6886275119c8d6562&_e=ZtG3yOYELyJwOrqEHF9cFRfTuyFvZeMOU5BJzC8CDKp5Xe6wzHXjky3JnKDLaNCBxrdVmjwimFJ4yna0TXfBr0Z7fFy4Dgle7qR5WUzmeqRX3XGjSx_4ZBEOblkhQEclV58TnYChez_BqpB357w3Oexe-12RFioieIyz0AFu6VdhI9je-4UEFWvXzplRshxM-Yruw6ISzOaUFDu-Pv6cRwsrdkU9lkSxmh845lCw_9cNda8D9q8J9rDrtJkLP76FlCCvcJiquu-F2kOUe5JRciyZT8YKUHSkTcB1Xjoxi6wlS8d7L8PxKQIgHGkPmzWrE8EtxDbeSGOpw9JY_91aTREoCMja63d4YoAF6qRKSBbb4GCTP9L41gEt1XUjVl-uvrVWRFpmRq8wmCtVv7auEDnKNCJc7V-se7iVYIQAHebTmbbsAL0akfCCMUQV_el4) __**If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**__ Please, only give what you can. An individual may not contribute more than a total of $2,800 (maximum for Primary Election) per election to the committee. Federal law prohibits contributions to the committee from the general treasury funds of a corporation, labor organizations or national banks (including corporate or other business entity credit cards), from any person contributing another’s funds, from a Federal government contractor, or from a foreign national who lacks permanent resident status.

The evidence is clear that China is culpable for the outbreak and the cover-up. This is a national security issue. View and share the post **[here.](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3798d5d08779488c9404a5d97b72785a&_e=riBdiMmEhWCN8gbfEyT9jjrfln7fSm24GwQ5lAe-n_U58ity0x95TW_Kbgb-1_11esmdtf9_g6I_tvNTsHw8fnEMdMYrLVcoH4ZDiNCCn33KPgcbToq36UvpxB9tfiR7AuVwJzV4-35QEkZCPisMx_Xdwn3IfgwuPQfMYH2qgHR6pGRBNf7jkpu825s37h_Wj2IhJGhzUrf1kJHE9caVJ8pizfo_dczkpZmVhcxJez_RSGQmyvQuTNXxq47vyUh171RLESnQpEtSqPjiNcalRh50bJ9mXYztIOvlpmRPi3Wv89ZKhqoTxUZ7HRFpP5u9t4X-g7jgt4OuXEm29UGPgwJKBndM5RCgnPQBFTqD4K-ljz3S04XjETUMHXojCe9a780_fAy6xw03Jvbu0L0QEDzlkjjOzUnD2eoGOPzxwevzPmYztKQeIzdr3Gnn3Vbg8oOSJHOlI7MhNLaPPp3tLrMG2wlxCFyQLBwnI2e9-FDdApIaGXOgmnO7oCSZs9td)**

| | Mitch McConnell is using President Obama as his personal punching bag... and WE'RE NOT HAVING IT. **Mitch McConnell is using President Obama as his personal punching bag ... and WE'RE NOT HAVING IT.** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0495/72412298/4f1e8806/6104b0c1/857154177/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfZGl0Y2htaXRjaF9vYmFtYSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNTE1X09iYW1hRmlnaHRfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyNSJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_ditchmitch_obama?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200515_ObamaFight_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200515_ObamaFight_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200515_ObamaFight_U1_X1") McConnell's FURIOUS! **Environmental leaders have spoken again: Support Doyle Canning for Congress!** "Now more than ever, America needs fighters at all levels of government who will stand up to corrupt interests and protect the rights of communities and our environment. [Friends of the Earth Action](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GgE/ni0YAA/t.31s/Je8IgOmDR1usecKQh6Rojw/h1/dBULV9qeb0LYcnDhpk62vE1KfbjKaGBgLLDhm-2BKj9N4NmzYe84Z1mC5oYoXDn2v0Zo9F7DGEghiyZK2E-2BmttSLxsj6d6RnWLguEuFuAWkfOoAvcA7hXQFL3mSanD53OyW-2FvMFBMY7rv0hnPwM8spANRcAGoW8FmVea7J-2FDcw-2FkRIo-2BqWEKgyy26KPn-2BPEvgsxYO2U5F11iYir8KUXF2ZSM29oI44-2BjbtNc6zG68nFwdAW4vRg7cOVkQ5XCUyCmqI7f8uWGQxrugAU9fW-2BcyJpiePBKng-2B5Lyszzs5QxwfgmTtLXT2ln9olQAPrO9Kb7tnAWoWA-2B5X6ptNC8s89MZ93ISow8L-2F51LNqZRijIZwNZ3sCvIEEw8euxenCuahasv2eXTCJT2QMRHh9HozrpnjLopwq1lBocB3hcmeWsnLPZIcu24ZsJ1YhgQSupnoGAA-2FR7MyZTGIC09oA1BS8QSuioKDjogADrtC2wJGkBlU5XhQl4KwABSxq91pJP0Nd65/lDj3) is proud to endorse these progressive candidates who are ready and eager to take on that fight. We call on our members, supporters, environmentalists, and voters across Oregon to support Doyle Canning for Congress on election day." Today Doyle joins a slate of candidates endorsed by FOE-Action, incumbents like Ro Khanna and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. But for Doyle to join them in Congress, first we have to win Tuesday's primary election! We are spending the weekend doing everything possible to make sure our voters turn in their ballots before Tuesday at 8 PM. Our campaign is 100% funded by our supporters, and this is these are final hours, when it is all on the line. **[We need your contribution today to get out the vote.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GgE/ni0YAA/t.31s/Je8IgOmDR1usecKQh6Rojw/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLKfMVBcsdNWxsekRveoNXMXn1jz4z4398YYt9p6imVA9UBE2g5G9k007s25w0dAcIo9F5LKwSlLX85qNvFjCVOe90xdhJsPEJCN6p216GnCstPxjzNulnYAM97H7lRCZ94pMm48lDKEGjRGlXFmOedt8D32g91Lt2qvCkIT9z07T8SQhvO-2BNr1AiOfRBgcDkEbiB4De6GeWxw66A8XgwOyBmEgipNzKQLgXdd8Y0jIMqBs08D8ziZ-2BJUO12s3wRgzZaY9uMmaTOMttQoTtyrzVt1L8Ntb5ScgrNpXUtNngYzgfWEJPslpR1SqUUpm8muov3uGd9za5BYC2LcU6mVMi/m5qr)**

[ **CHIP IN NOW** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GgE/ni0YAA/t.31s/Je8IgOmDR1usecKQh6Rojw/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLKfMVBcsdNWxsekRveoNXMLf19mcL6Qyn-2BaUMc5wxpStnTMPREqd2VHIW4ywgmg18oFu13e94CF3OCIWI4BPGPjQwKZRWCo4xyeafydR3TLqhlo8CB8dRM5xQMrK65lh9E9a9UJehJfKhLl4L7jL7IBDZRJyw-2BjpM3m-2ByO-2BoUXk-2BTmg6VTSKm19AICxHLa7Pz8limmKY9pPqRZbXohZ26RWdx-2FJ4eZMdCvt0NRBGCHQVRr3E5DVzcjDZtYarIMrKagcYd2cZ0xNtbA6pNbw2sNSXFDOcagoWO2VHwaM854-2FKletCSVvYJP-2FT7ckSni6IU1CMND2-2Bw9Wl31JZHA34gN/DsxK)

Friends of the Earth-Action (FOE-Action) is a leading voice in the fight to stop the Jordan Cove fracked gas pipeline and LNG export terminal in Southern Oregon. FOE Action is working on the Hill right now to block fossil fuel bailouts in COVID relief. Everyday, their team is organizing to keep intact forests standing, support sustainable agriculture, and protect our oceans. It's obvious who Friends of the Earth Action would choose in this race and why: Doyle is a true champion for our climate, for family farmers, for forests, and her record as a tireless environmental and climate leader speaks for itself. That's why Friends of the Earth-Action joins 350-Action, Climate Hawks Vote, Rachel's Action Network, Sunrise Movement Eugene/Corvallis/PDX, 350 Eugene Climate Emergency PAC, Sustainable Energy and Economy Network, and climate leaders like Bill McKibben, Josh Fox, Naomi Klein, Anthony Rogers-Wright and others like you in supporting Doyle. [**Please make a contribution now to back the climate warrior we need in Congress and get out the vote this weekend.** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GgE/ni0YAA/t.31s/Je8IgOmDR1usecKQh6Rojw/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLKfMVBcsdNWxsekRveoNXM5zqmMdLRkHe8pp7ULHxES7yYKQ24M-2Bp8Qb6jpYZ5yWrTeGhK12Mnv2Nojbm8hxBTIfSZ3pIkqiNh2HRFeh2BYLT8XSzfRwAZDlrEEUjExCfjiqjaSyjI8PCmIgqjQLZuYoyagrYgPaN-2BYNdu8f9JLXy-2B5l-2Fhnm7X4pUr5TTNhjFSynmFSGXLmhFokKR5ay57fMcOg62WY1U5YXl73LPivMbEafxRBzmiAPCPcsQfXX9lUB3IUJWgbb6rQnEzH1RGfFXwe9nw0zoU9rwdJJ5PP4qoPnDsjY1yyaaujeW-2BYg21SDcjvC3YjqVRofiE-2BqOr/8j0X) Onward, Team Canning

clean_body: | | | Environmental leaders have spoken again: Support Doyle Canning for Congress! "Now more than ever, America needs fighters at all levels of government who will stand up to corrupt interests and protect the rights of communities and our environment. is proud to endorse these progressive candidates who are ready and eager to take on that fight. We call on our members, supporters, environmentalists, and voters across Oregon to support Doyle Canning for Congress on election day." Today Doyle joins a slate of candidates endorsed by FOE-Action, incumbents like Ro Khanna and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. But for Doyle to join them in Congress, first we have to win Tuesday's primary election! We are spending the weekend doing everything possible to make sure our voters turn in their ballots before Tuesday at 8 PM. Our campaign is 100% funded by our supporters, and this is these are final hours, when it is all on the line. Friends of the Earth-Action (FOE-Action) is a leading voice in the fight to stop the Jordan Cove fracked gas pipeline and LNG export terminal in Southern Oregon. FOE Action is working on the Hill right now to block fossil fuel bailouts in COVID relief. Everyday, their team is organizing to keep intact forests standing, support sustainable agriculture, and protect our oceans. It's obvious who Friends of the Earth Action would choose in this race and why: Doyle is a true champion for our climate, for family farmers, for forests, and her record as a tireless environmental and climate leader speaks for itself. That's why Friends of the Earth-Action joins 350-Action, Climate Hawks Vote, Rachel's Action Network, Sunrise Movement Eugene/Corvallis/PDX, 350 Eugene Climate Emergency PAC, Sustainable Energy and Economy Network, and climate leaders like Bill McKibben, Josh Fox, Naomi Klein, Anthony Rogers-Wright and others like you in supporting Doyle. Onward, Team Canning | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! _ "Donate to Doyle Canning" | | Sent Via .
